**More than 143,000 people have made an average contribution of $48 to my opponent’s Senate campaign**

Fellow Conservative,

In just seven months, my opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, raised more than $7 million from both small-dollar donors (**donations under $200**) and major donors (**donations over $200**).

I hate to say it, but his success is incredible.

The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b389a5322e804e7f8132c7e983660b05&_e=I2pEbc3oFxB8HTYgyKvRzQeR7Hkl_Gp8iR3WNwWI-vcoOpP68hyvGmzEH96OK5hJt6JerLKuCKM52UyabGsUZHT9Pizd2JNi3iQD7N0eGTGtx0eQ-0j-51lXGBgOoN9af10h5yie9cR6g83EcOcY8_CjTFCudPNqyOlPKBqYRQ6geiwviZYXzgus5JMr2BLnIF3PME3vCyrD71LqkyyAz18Hx0ARQO_X81aXaQUbdROydEMOZlvB3PX2xfHvPS9KGQ5DJcHx4DJPjtwuN7nY8ucVkEzoeW_eivbtZISYMAn9sTs4PBsDoC0oA7H0wWDmLUZEANC3sNOyAl56lQOpe7Xo5A2Yvvackk1pzRXpL0qqAlDiQf2CAxVD8gVaFNZl7OX2Ohb84Grtq36G4LEqBMh2STiZGKr6UQ6VeksDzVw%3D)
**143,000 Americans donated to Tester’s campaign from Jan 1 - July 31st, with an average gift of $48. After 16 years in the national spotlight + making friends with ultra-wealthy lobbyists, his fundraising success shouldn’t come as a surprise. But it does.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Hi Friend,

One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of
socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have
wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal
of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is
equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other
or are they in conflict?

In this 25-page commentary, "Created Equal", legendary
economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and
other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas
Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the
Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed
through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly
illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and
equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the
name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true
for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will
end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created
Equal" now.

Thanks,

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and
Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven
policy research organization that seeks to improve the human
condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity,
national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one
hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that
have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

subject: BREAKING: Team DeSantis plan to attack Vivek

body:
Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response.
%recipient.md5_hash%

|

Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf0p0e3c94f6s76bu8ef63lsu2ee938ffvhmqc40_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)
**Fellow American DeSantis is going to come out swinging.** **[Will you stand with me in the next 30 mins to help us build our rapid response team for debate night?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhr8smtqdrm34tvfaa7odefaca0snermm38j8n8g_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)**

| [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr7oh3s80b05udejl5s8rhnjsnu3i5s681glcqi8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs) | | [Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztl5e7k36hkctcga992oehivl7vnbimf97n9ukgo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $20 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbbs1t5nnkttol1caqavrod652jhjbjd4fhlh1t8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs) | | [Chip in $50 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqsk695t02pvgmf8l5cjdk3ms3vuevvmkqpvrquo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)

Fellow American take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztfgcfqr7mts4olo6367248dsmh7bfudrt2p6umg_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)
The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night.

I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Fellow American. **[Please,_in the next 30 minutes_ , chip in whatever you can to help us build our Debate Night response team.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zedablehhkfnmkk3d12q0ka2tq34qcckm9s65fog_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpevotrp5fc2u1pnk8e9e0ohs52ogkm9tdij3m80_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** FIGHT BACK ->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc9q9q2p62ldmfj38s7048j60g78l1id1juv8hd8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zthkjvtllrv0bjbt4kf871jkt7b8ke53o6lu3hr8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1g4trvtsaclq6q88n7s3475mp3ektqpa8lqaldg_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8jpr489cgs33irq36hlva4juhsrkcudgo3o51o0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztrs9qli49nlkrrd911bugjn0ev5qahfalgfe9vg_rp22sh2s8i66p72clh6aor4c3h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Read/Act News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-fsP-6A)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors—material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom—a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals—visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook— _Victory and the Savior Generals_ —a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.readactnews._k5_rluN3qg)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://trk.readactnews._WnuOo5GF59wwEw1vcOYYg)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgk2ve8313if1op3ag5qqm7b2vj258jkc3qrncs0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj64o72clh2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2vamcl1lalsihofk0v03hefnjjl2kurnv9nahko_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj64o72clh2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8uevetdlenhcns3t1qo5vd8nok11tkub757n77o_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj64o72clh2bs)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed. But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.” The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake... ...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21846%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dLpBe3qvmypQvACXTQWTjQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21847%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u00hriR30gAp5TGQFLATyA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21848%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lwTyjt6lUUBynnWqExpTFw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21849%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aFf5IrjfnFkB%2f%2bNCq1VVxQ&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: This Democrat Senator made a massive mistake that has all hell breaking loose
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 20, 2023

This Democrat Senator
made a massive mistake that has all hell breaking loose

The Democrat Party seems to
trip over themselves with every chance they get. There might not
be a recovery from this misstep.

And this Democrat Senator made a
massive mistake that has all hell breaking loose.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Donald Trump's campaign
gets dealt a devastating blow

So far, former
President Trump has been dodging bullets. But he's finally been
caught.
➞ Continue Reading

This high-profile Democrat
just suffered a humiliating defeat

Politics can be a
firestorm for some. But for others, it can get even worse than
that.
➞ Continue Reading

Dan Bongino shares tragic
news with his audience

Podcast host Dan
Bongino is a beloved voice for conservatives. It's with a heavy
heart that he opened up about this.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: I'm a nurse practitioner...not a politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Hi, Peter! By now, you should know that I’m not a politician…I’ve told you a good bit about my service as a helicopter pilot in the Navy. But now I want to talk about another one of my jobs! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=992e0a971171a62686c3bb24354ad71666f80455b4f031db3e615527a56d8c5e08f59918e6a6ecf99214333d39bffd46a8bf0c610e203f22 After getting out of the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to become a board-certified Adult-Geriatric Primary Care Nurse Practitioner. I’ve worked in several long-term care and nursing facilities in Virginia Beach and Norfolk in addition to serving as a primary care provider for a small private practice in Virginia Beach. As a nurse practitioner, I saw primary care patients from all walks of life but my favorite patients are my oldest adults... they are so wise, so honest, and so grateful. I remember taking care of the cutest couple.... they were both 91 years young & sweetly finished each other’s sentences & knew each other’s health concerns inside & out. We work together to make their golden years the best they can be. It is an honor to participate in the healthcare of this greatest generation & and to advocate for them in government! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=992e0a971171a62686c3bb24354ad71666f80455b4f031db3e615527a56d8c5e08f59918e6a6ecf99214333d39bffd46a8bf0c610e203f22 In fact, I’m proud to be the FIRST Nurse Practitioner elected to Congress…I am honored to be a voice in government for all nurses and patients! See…I think we need more people in Congress who haven’t spent their entire careers in elected office. I often use my real-life experiences as a nurse practitioner, Navy pilot, and mom to help make decisions about issues! So I want to hear from you: do you think we need more people with real-world experience in Congress? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=992e0a971171a62686c3bb24354ad71666f80455b4f031db3e615527a56d8c5e08f59918e6a6ecf99214333d39bffd46a8bf0c610e203f22 SHARE YOUR OPINION https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=992e0a971171a62686c3bb24354ad71666f80455b4f031db3e615527a56d8c5e08f59918e6a6ecf99214333d39bffd46a8bf0c610e203f22 Please take our poll right now and share your opinion with me about what type of people you want to see serving you in Congress! I look forward to reading your responses! -Jen To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=992e0a971171a6260e6092f800dbe10fe04e4afb1cdd8305477f52f0d0de5520c45fe645a41d5230fe915d7d0f5cb670d34a155fac3e77e7 here . name: American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zejvtk8oktq09q0gigtbabasrl4gle6otpv1o7pg_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj6apb2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcvpcp97sfdgf940vabp9eq9aog5m1d7nibftbfo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj6apb2chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0m9pmj9nhggnu830osddlcgcpev0faaqi6259ao_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj6apb2chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6ivo4uscb9ialvuasrk7dqp0mftrshsh3as003g_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj6apb2chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---

[Alaska youth volunteered for 800 hours on the way to Air Force career](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zif1ps8aq5d7seech8usn2fkfqcafh46ll7k3emg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f830sui69pt466q3ctlk6miffdbhe2qq6tthmlpr2t9l69qj2dd36up7b870c1iq1dtle9r7b9tjmmgn1d9lktq39td1euqq8d5iemhjfcjm6kqqcd1iekqj4tt246h22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob6c1h2bs)
Jacob Schwartz began his Alaska VA youth volunteer journey over eight years ago. It was his father, nurse Mark Schwartz, a 30-year Alaska VA employee, who told him about the many ways he could volunteer. Over the course of those eight years, he accumulated over 800 volunteer hours and a few accolades.

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb1b6e0t658hhj0h24uktro2v8vndri3mcv6hgog_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z55slu1d562v2sni3cdb9bl4gemq9rima4vtm9a8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmuggauckr4mqtimt8qp8pgb9mjf57kajjb84d0g_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4m0e2vo52q8o1a96667nsmrgjbl4p9rpgj2cie0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jl12tb2j1fun8hni6rev6dct69rkvc82sro6mg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68pb1c5hm4oh1k8gn48n24hhm9oj5cphm2oj0s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk45g9p4juu4qaaci9npe03rq9nnnsfbb3psu6fo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)_

name: John James
subject: The Situation is Dire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
Can I count on you to step up?
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zho4fn6164tkchrjcgv8bvgces973jk3bgig691g_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u4qn8tjm69h3fcpgc9jjecpk65i34tple1o66t34clhb9orgs9hr9p5imhim3dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphim2pm8c3impj3ao5jchjr1db5e8iv0)
| | | Fellow Patriot, I need your help right now, because my situation is dire.

My name is John James. I’m a Christian, conservative combat veteran who’s running a grassroots campaign to bring strong leadership back to Washington, DC.

I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq because I wanted to defend our freedom. Now, I’m serving AGAIN to save our country from the radical socialists.

I know you’re just like me. You want to see the best for our nation. That’s why it’s critical that we prevent the Democrats from buying our election.

**Radical Leftists in the Beltway are planning to spend MILLIONS to silence me. They don’t want another black conservative voice speaking out against their hypocrisy.** **[_If I’m going to defeat their Marxist agenda, I’m going to need a lot of help. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support._](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztj1o10qnhl733efldaqjdaf29qh2rfqekalbgco_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)**
---
[**PITCH IN NOW TO HELP A FORMER APACHE PILOT**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqbek2ho2itvs5djp1p0doumunlh8nebdakhacko_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)
---
My last election was decided by **1,600 votes**. The Democrat Establishment almost took me down, but with the support of patriots like you, **_I was victorious_**. We might not be so lucky next time. The Democrats have already confirmed that they’re **_doubling down._** I need to level with you, if we don’t get support soon, we may have to throw in the towel.

All I’m asking is this: could you pitch in just a few bucks today so we can have the support needed to carry us through the finish line?

**[_Can I count on you to step up?_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zomh2qutgc6r05g1nkv7h4fri1rslj8mucafuvag_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)**
---
[**PITCH IN NOW TO HELP A FORMER APACHE PILOT**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu17cnk0l0cv2jcl2178v86euc1nill0gg5aqt2g_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbgtalten16d9udbsn05ldndmncpmelmq1qbr8vo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clj66ob2c3h2bs)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend,
This is no doubt a dark time for America.
But I also woke up this morning to the many, many messages of support from countless patriots across the country who will NEVER give up on our noble mission.
And I must say, even with this very dark cloud hanging over our nation, it's those freedom-loving patriots like YOU who are my source of courage, hope, and my UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA.
_But how could we ever give up on America?_
She is the freest and greatest country in history. She is a beacon of hope to the world that through hard work and perseverance, _anything_ is possible.
So, whenever I'm asked, "Sir, why keep fighting? Why not just walk away and never have to think about these witch hunts ever again?"
My answer is simple...
Even after _FOUR_ unlawful **INDICTMENTS** against me as an innocent man, even with Crooked Joe and his accomplices trying to JAIL me for hundreds of years, I will remain right where I belong: _between YOU and the entrenched Deep State that hates our country._

Not on my watch, Friend. I will **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the Left's tyranny!

clean_body: I want you to see this. | | Friend, It can be daunting when you hear about the MILLIONS of dollars in left-wing special interest money being funneled into the 2024 election to BUY the White House. How could a contribution of $1 or $5 - even $24 - stand a chance? Well, as I always say, your $1 is NEVER ALONE. Your contribution is backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Together, our team of grassroots donors even has the power to OUTRAISE the left-wing special interest tyrants who believe they are entitled to permanent rule over America. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tues, August 15, 2023 Subject: "Why not just walk away?" To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Friend, This is no doubt a dark time for America. But I also woke up this morning to the many, many messages of support from countless patriots across the country who will NEVER give up on our noble mission. And I must say, even with this very dark cloud hanging over our nation, it's those freedom-loving patriots like YOU who are my source of courage, hope, and my UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA. But how could we ever give up on America? She is the freest and greatest country in history. She is a beacon of hope to the world that through hard work and perseverance, anything is possible. So, whenever I'm asked, "Sir, why keep fighting? Why not just walk away and never have to think about these witch hunts ever again?" My answer is simple... Even after FOUR unlawful INDICTMENTS against me as an innocent man, even with Crooked Joe and his accomplices trying to JAIL me for hundreds of years, I will remain right where I belong: between YOU and the entrenched Deep State that hates our country. Because walking away would mean condemning America to a lifetime of Third World Marxist tyranny. Not on my watch, Friend. I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left's tyranny! If you 're struggling due to the crooks and thugs who are running our country right now, then do not donate. I mean it! Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come roaring back. You have my word. But if you can contribute, then God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d2bf1013e4943f2a9b525d325a54115&_e=KGFBxlZZHrxTxIW32xMhDwPHrj4NHmByW6faaiRN2LoAIrOnQRmr9jJODuSWpNMQrzg2OeKwkkOHVtd4HVOKRvkcIQNMt5r_zoa-rx0dYzo3LhaSecgtN2iTVDAwLIPbkCfgoT4M6qQoAShHUr6Dab8PipInjylSG0a8ASNbMTiH5R3B6qIpur1iuQr5oWOJTp_8b2c8Or14Sfl2_dKMZx5jbdOac7q2gZIPcHwmSvw7eXhEjnMYLDuRH3F4sopzmOG6SmhI9-fCe1cmaEdPWF_2oD8SOJLW3Bg_yfh2tMAl3VkQ10MAmDWu0XDOzXVUZrwEhn3_q0soNsf3ckczh7lm2iHpBSsCSUt9H2JLCYvCWHOf2ZlzxQx5G0_M6OkmrPJs7E5O9lTrCcWm4upvYA%3D%3D)

Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)

name: TRUMP INDICTED
subject: America is finished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILLPAC
body:
Our country is on the brink of destruction

| |
---
| | | America is done for.

Our freedoms are no more.

Friend, our country is on the brink of destruction.

_**The Far-Left has just indicted President Trump on racketeering charges & is on the verge of throwing him behind bars for the rest of his life.**_

Democrats under Joe Biden are everything Trump told you they were; authoritarian dictators hell-bent on complete political power.

And they're about to get away with the biggest abuse of power in American history...

**[We're begging, pleading, PRAYING for any and every pro-Trump Conservative to join us and stand with Trump against this witch hunt:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z88vp8uu8hhkrauprfl4ib51800lomij8sm3s5ng_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm0o35chh2bs "We’re begging, pleading, PRAYING for any and every pro-Trump Conservative to help us STOP this witch hunt RIGHT HERE and RIGHT NOW.")**

---
| | [STAND WITH TRUMP AGAINST THIS WITCH HUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm0opftvv9o72evm38nm43d5faos14jrln3odh9o_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm0o35chh2bs)
---

Trust us when we say, Democrats won't stop until every Conservative who opposes their power is with Trump in a jail cell.

Just as Trump said: They're not just after him. They're after you too, Friend. He was just in the way.

But we're organizing a response so huge, they'll have no choice but to back down.

There's no time to think.

We need every true Trump Conservative to join us and stand with Trump against us this witch hunt.

---
| | [STAND WITH TRUMP AGAINST THIS WITCH HUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z61fdkmjnprthto72hi01kttuoqu35tlnqie4jig_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm0o35chh2bs)
---

The entire world is watching, Friend - show them you won't give in, you won't back down, & stand with us today.
---

| |
* * *
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zelve9v8ucceqdruft01v95i2b08492lt2g1geb0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm0o35chh2bs) Friend - it's Bill Eigel here, and I have an important message for you.
The radical left's liberal agenda is completely RUINING our home.

The Biden-Harris administration _**REFUSES**_ to address critical issues and recklessly spends hard-earned American dollars! From a crisis at our southern border to skyrocketing inflation, we need to **_TAKE BACK_** our country before it's too late.

**That is why I am fighting to restore CONSERVATIVE VALUES back in America!**

But I can't do this alone, Friend. I'm humbly asking true Patriots to step it up and join my fight TODAY. **[Will you stand with us as we push back against Liberal TYRANNY?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1k878vblaqbhle1ctjha90dchbvpadem87b1u8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm0o35chh2bs "Will you stand with us as we push back against Liberal TYRANNY?")**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We hate to say it, but this could 🐝 a disaster
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend. Yesterday, we fell seriously short of our National Honey Bee Day goal. Now, we have one last chance to close the fundraising gap and avoid DISASTER for pollinators and our fragile planet. **
Here’s why your matched gift is so critical right now: Chemical corporations are POISONING the precious bees we rely on and risking the future of our food system. Friends of the Earth is fighting back against these companies and their out-of-control pesticide pollution. **But any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits.** We can’t let that happen.
With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to **EXTEND this once-a-year Honey Bee Day match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY.** So we had to reach out to you while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for bees and our planet.
| ⚠️ **DONATION STATUS UPDATE** | **EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS: ****EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m. **
** NATIONAL HONEY BEE DAY GOAL: FALLING SHORT**
**DONORS NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA:** **7**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937815?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m._
---
To be totally honest, friend, we’re worried. **We set our goal of hitting $107,000 before our National Honey Bee Day deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to raise to continue this urgent fight.** We've got a no-nonsense budget, and every dollar has a job to do – whether that's mobilizing communities on the ground, advocating for bee-safe farming practices or putting pressure on Big Ag to clean up its act before it's too late.
**If we fall short, this work gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in polluted farm fields, MORE pollinator deaths and alarming consequences for human health. **
Globally, we're already seeing a drop in bee-pollinated fruits, veggies and nuts. Researchers say this decrease of healthy foods could potentially lead to almost 500,000 excess deaths per year! We can't afford to stand back and let pesticide companies put our bees and our communities in danger. **That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect these tiny pollinators, the ecosystems they maintain, and our planet. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. **
[**Please, rush your $27 membership gift now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at midnight tonight, and every dollar will be doubled – up to $107,000 – to power the fight for our only Earth!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937816?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937817?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937818?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937819?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937815?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you for your urgent support,

Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science
Friends of the Earth

subject: Peter, asking for $5.
body:
we have a real chance to win this thing
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb863e34c-ca4d-4507-bc83-35db32466daf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, Peter, **[I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cc6575a-9ac9-42d3-8020-a6b9040c5d09/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34dd1402-5837-4780-a490-643776575922/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Donate $5 now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e239faa-3ec5-4e8b-a768-9306daef9faf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Since we launched this campaign, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both upgraded our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue. And a new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided. This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, Peter, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. But the more national attention this race gets, the more wealthy Republicans will be lining up to fill Ted Cruz's war chest. I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day. [Please, will you split a donation of $5, $10, or any amount that's meaningful to you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help defeat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9779868-2bf8-4fb6-9027-081d50228e38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6b51c16-2687-4698-87bc-886cde29f52d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: One of the hardest things I’ve ever had to write...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp320ctlretqvlg7ej6pm8v1rdo2vg2ak68ukmqo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmlch06qps6jnkqtcq5ir7ok0m2au46k9lse0f68_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself–she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zan14iqee660gi141p9k1mc40auu3ncaseieqt5o_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq43mjk215p71rvkhhoqq2io2q6ift390a7ovmr0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs)
---
|
---
| [RUSH $250 >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z37s3sqgp1h6ttubfobvu5tcqu6tpj48alujdvso_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs "RUSH $250")
---
| [RUSH $100 >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr5b2kmlibq4j665h0ni6e881b63losj3uahtod0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs "RUSH $100")
---
| [RUSH $50 >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zimagp0rm1qg57jv66t8ta3e3in0c4j3op2vcuso_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs "RUSH $50")
---
| [RUSH $25 >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1rjs76k775g0mvhjhufn2rjeb6n76jirbmo9jm8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs "RUSH $25")
---
| [RUSH other >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeq37kplr3o71c1852a8uuh8u67n5olor2kk36v0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgm4pr4c3h2bs "RUSH other")
---
| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She’s **stood against the Woke “Squad,”** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b1eb4dbc1654af2afa54ab36f05133b&_e=d7VYLM9wv7QaFkR4DR8if1AfJ0bZX8nP7FJYnzrTAJKE3_caeI9AL5lLry6bekFQtVLWRbEsbXu1vU0sk4r4omVQ1IFp8RgttTuOlTzrQWFxkOVVyCWSQvjtA2qT-zMO3uKkipekkE1YCPzGGJ73_gGys_7FFxB9RBct85gAercsErKDWdLtS8Ab1afVoCsOReWeHpbcKC46Fe1oEZug4d4xJJb8rayJ3BBKjSOsISHDAZ3kMn0mthwCHBdVxIidwJ1jCej4r_AeaxqOk9OiZDGOzdNGaqIx6a2lJ7CrE2Mti2QIePvZOqOtR3DQi_JH6i0cNHQN60fDxHAMy2C79XskpgBIXvyl22vUzoUfqAYEF7HIvXO8-Jn0DwqKQ5mW31qcGlL_lU-hLMia-O5_Fg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b1eb4dbc1654af2afa54ab36f05133b&_e=d7VYLM9wv7QaFkR4DR8if1AfJ0bZX8nP7FJYnzrTAJKE3_caeI9AL5lLry6bekFQtVLWRbEsbXu1vU0sk4r4omVQ1IFp8RgttTuOlTzrQWFxkOVVyCWSQvjtA2qT-zMO3uKkipekkE1YCPzGGJ73_gGys_7FFxB9RBct85gAercsErKDWdLtS8Ab1afVoCsOReWeHpbcKC46Fe1oEZug4d4xJJb8rayJ3BBKjSOsISHDAZ3kMn0mthwCHBdVxIidZAoNlrKF_gRxsvMlSJor1wlJtv1pnB2V0hzIxOJNHmpAn6dvh6xCQKqkE2y0DzkaJLUVUNwJsgLeMDr-ufaw6Du3c7l7PUWJHYqxppCHfEvT-RDTCYv2LvH8hNQeif2kXV1_uKK3udMnSWC7vb0beQ%3D%3D)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b1eb4dbc1654af2afa54ab36f05133b&_e=d7VYLM9wv7QaFkR4DR8if1AfJ0bZX8nP7FJYnzrTAJKE3_caeI9AL5lLry6bekFQtVLWRbEsbXu1vU0sk4r4omVQ1IFp8RgttTuOlTzrQWFxkOVVyCWSQvjtA2qT-zMO3uKkipekkE1YCPzGGJ73_gGys_7FFxB9RBct85gAercsErKDWdLtS8Ab1afVoCsOReWeHpbcKC46Fe1oEZug4d4xJJb8rayJ3BBKjSOsISHDAZ3kMn0mthwCHBdVxIidNN_FX1jviwgB9IR-_lN4AEbRrBtprI0WYYZki6QhnAPane243n0OEcgI80yJmvZz8W4SqnksX1h9W-EdJh7DW17Eg-2JL2D0AuBQHF6akCzqgOl2dKwAPg5d6N5bE8GmUB-8-vaKBoUiaM7mGa_ZUw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed. But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees." The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake ... ...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zughb0rd10b1afco0231546t8dhaiqii440d42m8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgmcor2c5h2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**
---

---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq9uc1u5q3ijfn3p8d964ih0bcmahajr05bv64no_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgmcor2c5h2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**

---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy
---

_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvhtp35a6fn82afhjkd90vqckk992s9kps69flc0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgmcor2c5h2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bb4f0af49884051a9ff24c932d39e40&_e=Qw4fMrp42uViJCS0TP4L7Ves9QQnEJUnyP3XY5YklNFAdORrliKIfMrirVsVq-Qf52gp0Odr51kGYRI9SNw-4jK2AehZC145NP8kN6w4yxx4NNYHPWreN-m6t723bqNGnsqRiHiwyd8f8BYmdoZklmwNgVcNJ8ftoieiFlJw5XInJkjOKcOxfRcZgt_RG8p0hGpojN8_fjpyw1ShsmjqRUo2FYtkUQxM02jaGFY6Qm_cy8VGCx_2YnzRPQgpwCYiCUMITVPzmhYBJ049C0pJup5DIbrx3C1ezYN1iZNjdq942bhqmr3mbKKHNJA5HJnp1xRk5CXStPuBCmVW_DISBiBVMbC8pX-dSIIuM4Fv1HVUxGRo07kxRB0k-CPx27ZBRefeCrcYXIkZB1OCfJL4Jzwrg1fiTVxtbM5L55SOPq7sQYYoGJZlYjgjVre1Z0C8)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bb4f0af49884051a9ff24c932d39e40&_e=Qw4fMrp42uViJCS0TP4L7Ves9QQnEJUnyP3XY5YklNFAdORrliKIfMrirVsVq-Qf52gp0Odr51kGYRI9SNw-4jK2AehZC145NP8kN6w4yxx4NNYHPWreN-m6t723bqNGnsqRiHiwyd8f8BYmdoZklmwNgVcNJ8ftoieiFlJw5XInJkjOKcOxfRcZgt_RG8p0hGpojN8_fjpyw1ShsmjqRUo2FYtkUQxM02jaGFY6Qm_cy8VGCx_2YnzRPQgpwCYiCUMITVPzmhYBJ049C0pJut6iOJuWA1a4L0aH-tc4GVgVohP-wpV3X4M6MgvaBMXgzXN1vaVBet_e-5zOLrrzqkxuR36zy_7o-JNbgv_cdnSEaaBNSZw9M06hXOlSh76PtQN-HHJsUYEkavDNqwU_sRAusSxz_JnqgLLZjwwbbq1X5M7VeU7jv2EwXngXRrpB)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bb4f0af49884051a9ff24c932d39e40&_e=Qw4fMrp42uViJCS0TP4L7Ves9QQnEJUnyP3XY5YklNFAdORrliKIfMrirVsVq-Qf52gp0Odr51kGYRI9SNw-4jK2AehZC145NP8kN6w4yxx4NNYHPWreN-m6t723bqNGnsqRiHiwyd8f8BYmdoZklmwNgVcNJ8ftoieiFlJw5XInJkjOKcOxfRcZgt_RG8p0hGpojN8_fjpyw1ShsmjqRUo2FYtkUQxM02jaGFY6Qm_cy8VGCx_2YnzRPQgpwCYiCUMITVPzmhYBJ049C0pJupSEVNBPA989E_XIoRB-xOk9Hg7H6z9MZLpRYTsHUOT_lEvB5Jde0owQi9QrtBTl90Rcc4TzZkQ-3aJXj47LP62VA5stWx7Kk6F4J-3bwhbt8C9SfKJFXeiB2tv0VimuPTTAcKv0S2vDWooXr7udykerZDb61vIEZZqFTCT9THJa)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7bb4f0af49884051a9ff24c932d39e40&_e=Qw4fMrp42uViJCS0TP4L7Ves9QQnEJUnyP3XY5YklNFAdORrliKIfMrirVsVq-Qf52gp0Odr51kGYRI9SNw-4jK2AehZC145NP8kN6w4yxx4NNYHPWreN-m6t723bqNGnsqRiHiwyd8f8BYmdoZklmwNgVcNJ8ftoieiFlJw5XInJkjOKcOxfRcZgt_RG8p0hGpojN8_fjpyw1ShsmjqRUo2FYtkUQxM02jaGFY6Qm_cy8VGCx_2YnzRPQgpwCYiCUMITVPzmhYBJ049C0pJuu7FcE0ELuDpE_WoYsTiS8W_Dn2vLXRGZjQclsRhoBZfqkBJ-9ehP-5P3fbw6bRcEUCilpkxNrDgR2e2sLc_ztl2NM0yEyrOL4ZLtw8CpG-0vuaPUIZCu278GsoTZR4QJxRcdvVSEVD0_u41lRcWvMiGX7ka07sulX5IFs9n45gu).

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Trump is nowhere to be found after abruptly canceling historic event
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 20, 2023

Trump is nowhere to
be found after abruptly canceling historic event
Former President Trump was
about to crack his election case wide open. Now he's missing in
action.

And Trump is nowhere to be found
after abruptly canceling a historic event.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This Democrat Senator made
a massive mistake that has all hell breaking loose

The Democrat Party
seems to trip over themselves with every chance they get. There
might not be a recovery from this misstep.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump's campaign
gets dealt a devastating blow

So far, former
President Trump has been dodging bullets. But he's finally been
caught.
➞ Continue Reading

This high-profile Democrat
just suffered a humiliating defeat

Politics can be a
firestorm for some. But for others, it can get even worse than
that.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zui3475sgqc14flkl6fma1s98mehe4k0h75aho30_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgmeoj4c3h2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs3ed33531i1nm877fac8bksfs402r7ppsla1cfo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgmeoj4c3h2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**

Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy

_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf7gq9snguqpoesvkua8kq7tfrie9qk5ga5dkm00_rp22sh2s8i66p72clgmeoj4c3h2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**
