body:
As Speaker of the House, I need to know.

| |
---
| | | Friend.

Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants in his State of the Union speech - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**
---
| | [OPTION 1](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef2b67f53dcf4280b08017dee3723e1f&_e=xARhxUejB8FVCfv8VBovpoHZbJvu28YOCeEYJLiK9rRL6TZ0HCdp4v364QMM_oF8IvbQ3Mr4Mt-IySiv7jlPHqiRr_OfSs4WDg8ohq0ZyIniSUNRVdK6X9AYpm0euZrbG2gs_t6azLQ_257xq7PXrahXT8y2Mro0wS2hotVWiwWGuVU3DEK54QDHrd-xVW-32QHT8l6oE7py0EKF-QibLl3-SId8fdaWS5WqYyGBY6Gny46P_lImcyqU9yURZ6Kdnpx9jI7klzXWZ8qtUVsRsfFfJVt8hM2i-6WHWdLF_FF02k9dtP5IgQjGZjdieEyIUIfU7x_MbJLxPRoT8Cka1XjkZM9dILJSzDXGZ-iuK6O4u0h1Qpnyujl5ylQeSDFQLxXV5yQYQQuqfmlL4wu8Obqr1fpdpKsc1Q_BGnui7HiP6XHuH1s25pKWjqDbmAXZzedmJvT11YLsYNOQL5uaYQ%3D%3D "OPTION 1")
---
**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**
---
| | [OPTION 2](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef2b67f53dcf4280b08017dee3723e1f&_e=xARhxUejB8FVCfv8VBovpoHZbJvu28YOCeEYJLiK9rRL6TZ0HCdp4v364QMM_oF8IvbQ3Mr4Mt-IySiv7jlPHqiRr_OfSs4WDg8ohq0ZyIniSUNRVdK6X9AYpm0euZrbG2gs_t6azLQ_257xq7PXrahXT8y2Mro0wS2hotVWiwWGuVU3DEK54QDHrd-xVW-32QHT8l6oE7py0EKF-QibLl3-SId8fdaWS5WqYyGBY6Gny46P_lImcyqU9yURZ6Kdnpx9jI7klzXWZ8qtUVsRsfFfJVt8hM2i-6WHWdLF_FF02k9dtP5IgQjGZjdieEyIqUmyq8EwSW7X4o2xp9eRFSqh6ED-EnYoRGhVIkWaPG86eDorG5ahZWqkTboc69K8prB70hNjKwRMBvKR-xcRSRza0IZVYcIYYGQMKNYAKvkfDYoa3y4XtgXiehPyAlKeTrOkdTgUDhSh_oHYd607wQ%3D%3D "OPTION 2")
---
Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef2b67f53dcf4280b08017dee3723e1f&_e=xARhxUejB8FVCfv8VBovpoHZbJvu28YOCeEYJLiK9rRL6TZ0HCdp4v364QMM_oF8IvbQ3Mr4Mt-IySiv7jlPHqiRr_OfSs4WDg8ohq0ZyIniSUNRVdK6X9AYpm0euZrbG2gs_t6azLQ_257xq7PXrahXT8y2Mro0wS2hotVWiwWGuVU3DEK54QDHrd-xVW-32QHT8l6oE7py0EKF-QibLl3-SId8fdaWS5WqYyGBY6Gny46P_lImcyqU9yURZ6Kdnpx9jI7klzXWZ8qtUVsRsfFfJVt8hM2i-6WHWdLF_FF02k9dtP5IgQjGZjdieEyI_qRMPyfN1t13pvo5emsAGP8RriQ0usuT4UAe9sK_YeILliDX8V0K4GvdwfoRbyVrO4Y0-o68UNnclYLIfhLzrAG6LUekIocPEC2SEgb-JRaelCXEnYqn8q_UoVFD8ohr3eCv3gzNLdYpLbVSFArPrA%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

subject: Can I loop you in?
body:
I knew it wouldn't be easy

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea4bd423b5df40efa381fd804d5d1ad1&_e=Nc_y53ASlR7i2o_Psen_5lAW909yG1-X2hH2eU8RhJSC8j1gF8H09SuF_AYrq6XMlBKef8-vIvjhz4tfPolTc5zPpsnp1i36TpKCQXey9BmdtFxonBjun_ijSwZeAW2trzulCsFZ6Z9GsB29YK1c3usZNd24GK56FSSZ64ut1XLY56Q8QAXPkZi_z05XAbtMsjNSoPim5xw5BsG8QB5B7llRor4eycH7WRm5W7ATWPtOMc7KH6bGLEm-mAIadbtDpOXAcaNc2Ck8SLK12aMXjoSaSl7dPiY1sxDtfmpGNR8FBfwvWVCuJVjgSLKvzwPGfW0AQGmQE1u-zB_juRIKmBG5yZqN1iCuAtq4l1fqzSIZQdKxlaxShCAumCnvU9LYrtruy-4Mh56Q5XDVxTdHR_Z4QwzsEUTbg_pgJeOjxKIecsWN-BW1pDQvBTBvyLhj "New Message From: Riley Gaines")
---

_**[Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women's sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea4bd423b5df40efa381fd804d5d1ad1&_e=Nc_y53ASlR7i2o_Psen_5lAW909yG1-X2hH2eU8RhJSC8j1gF8H09SuF_AYrq6XMlBKef8-vIvjhz4tfPolTc5zPpsnp1i36TpKCQXey9BmdtFxonBjun_ijSwZeAW2trzulCsFZ6Z9GsB29YK1c3usZNd24GK56FSSZ64ut1XLY56Q8QAXPkZi_z05XAbtMsjNSoPim5xw5BsG8QB5B7llRor4eycH7WRm5W7ATWPtOMc7KH6bGLEm-mAIadbtDpOXAcaNc2Ck8SLK12aMXjoSaSl7dPiY1sxDtfmpGNR8gGPog9ZyZdIM--8yol2YpxSmzmxtuqqiKEwFW6T5HurFMCB7_3ENiBiV5rL_e8qUz-09cx4Uv3ZNvW1fH4haNk9Xb6erJLlnjfqQh7rMLcCA9ORLnzZE2FTTTjH1o4tAsRFrvKR84pLinHJLxycQw "Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women’s sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn. ")**_

I grew up swimming and was blessed to receive a scholarship to the University of Kentucky. It was all a dream come true... _Until it wasn 't._

When a 6'4 male walked into our locker room. Myself and other young women were expected to carry on business as usual, but I didn't stand for it.

I immediately left the locker room and asked a pool official how it was allowed to happen. I was told they "got around that," and it was okay. **That 's where my outrage began.**

Any man, coach, or official could have full access by making the locker rooms unisex. We weren't warned. We were subjected. And to rub salt into the wound, I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I've experienced the fear. I've experienced the sadness. I've experienced what Democrats think is "no big deal." And now, because I didn't stand for it and spoke up for women and girls everywhere, I have a target on my back.

Unfortunately for them, it has only empowered me. _**[My mission to save women's sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what's happening in women's sports is only the beginning.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea4bd423b5df40efa381fd804d5d1ad1&_e=Nc_y53ASlR7i2o_Psen_5lAW909yG1-X2hH2eU8RhJSC8j1gF8H09SuF_AYrq6XMlBKef8-vIvjhz4tfPolTc5zPpsnp1i36TpKCQXey9BmdtFxonBjun_ijSwZeAW2trzulCsFZ6Z9GsB29YK1c3usZNd24GK56FSSZ64ut1XLY56Q8QAXPkZi_z05XAbtMsjNSoPim5xw5BsG8QB5B7llRor4eycH7WRm5W7ATWPtOMc7KH6bGLEm-mAIadbtDpOXAcaNc2Ck8SLK12aMXjoSaSl7dPiY1sxDtfmpGNR9xZqzjaMeWmhrfINlrtEGYjHCP6j4SnVLeZJltTOkP64i7PEj6v6wqYUhAVrGxlGlPfxmCM88QJCUUzh2cImMGAWG1bCY5L-QpjFkzGQvfwkslPuSOgZcivg_Ub7NF7U1HyoEnHO3CsX81HKCmjiZk "My mission to save women’s sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning.")**_

The woke, transgender agenda won't stop.

I refuse to let this journey end. I refuse to bow down because they want me to. _**[I'm asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea4bd423b5df40efa381fd804d5d1ad1&_e=Nc_y53ASlR7i2o_Psen_5lAW909yG1-X2hH2eU8RhJSC8j1gF8H09SuF_AYrq6XMlBKef8-vIvjhz4tfPolTc5zPpsnp1i36TpKCQXey9BmdtFxonBjun_ijSwZeAW2trzulCsFZ6Z9GsB29YK1c3usZNd24GK56FSSZ64ut1XLY56Q8QAXPkZi_z05XAbtMsjNSoPim5xw5BsG8QB5B7llRor4eycH7WRm5W7ATWPtOMc7KH6bGLEm-mAIadbtDpOXAcaNc2Ck8SLK12aMXjoSaSl7dPiY1sxDtfmpGNR-vSe_L1pTL1TeFJrpd9l66xhxiQV7bZ8P34OI5lTTgA5GET9oizM3DmkpjOru2DCizJR-Olbg43nPfTvOQl69igXhLDe3iUD075-kp_8nIHZchP5zUjSf8wle7kjPnL7yvJLjZdzJ1pN7Mnsvnhrja "I’m asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports.")**_

Can I count on you?

Thank you,

Riley

The American people are waking up and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning." The woke, transgender agenda won't stop. I refuse to let this journey end. I refuse to bow down because they want me to. "I’m asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports." Can I count on you? Thank you, Riley | | | | | | "Marsha Image Footer" | | A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left. | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=485cb508401d4e899b52bc1b0cf97393&_e=iIpizZYrr48-wSC97z7tLvTg3kmbyGbZD-FRId1r1n-Y9f6F1AidrRCAUkv3YYQUl0D5fi9Q-RF8bo-08ewz002t3o-X21izdrqhQkEGk0ylSiDrVCME3Od810diI7bfhXoSH5ng4fBT3_p3Sq7rnbb8pEcwt9xyogjjybzI7-U7tHfSeuAqowxGkFb3aUlC-roeifyEVmqFMGqYchKHn5L0I8BWa-PCr6Bnojtx0jxHK71Zge5nSke3yy9llGZej4z55F5jz0u0CwXt0tRJ7TJpmVCO605HqUnIC_-zO0sgyxJBnpedzoBLu2D3Eu5SWwE7Og8Hwtwg2LijTx1UbcPR9bgbt2vgPcwgcixIp9nFroDWKfj34KbgP2Cd8_8g95HP2KUObjGhFm2lwPmG3L4PVu_UBora5gmMd3W-O_U%3D)

Friend,
This is no doubt a dark time for America.
But I also woke up this morning to the many, many messages of support from countless patriots across the country who will NEVER give up on our noble mission.
And I must say, even with this very dark cloud hanging over our nation, it's those freedom-loving patriots like YOU who are my source of courage, hope, and my UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA.
_But how could we ever give up on America?_
She is the freest and greatest country in history. She is a beacon of hope to the world that through hard work and perseverance, _anything_ is possible.
So, whenever I'm asked, "Sir, why keep fighting? Why not just walk away and never have to think about these witch hunts ever again?"
My answer is simple...
Even after _FOUR_ unlawful **INDICTMENTS** against me as an innocent man, even with Crooked Joe and his accomplices trying to JAIL me for hundreds of years, I will remain right where I belong: _between YOU and the entrenched Deep State that hates our country._
Because walking away would mean condemning America to a lifetime of Third World Marxist tyranny.
Not on my watch, Friend. I will **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to the Left's tyranny!
_If you 're struggling due to the crooks and thugs who are running our country right now, then do not donate. I mean it! Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come roaring back. You have my word. _

I want you to see this. | | Friend, It can be daunting when you hear about the MILLIONS of dollars in left-wing special interest money being funneled into the 2024 election to BUY the White House. How could a contribution of $1 or $5 - even $24 - stand a chance? Well, as I always say, your $1 is NEVER ALONE. Your contribution is backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Together, our team of grassroots donors even has the power to OUTRAISE the left-wing special interest tyrants who believe they are entitled to permanent rule over America. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tues, August 15, 2023 Subject: "Why not just walk away?" To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Friend, This is no doubt a dark time for America. But I also woke up this morning to the many, many messages of support from countless patriots across the country who will NEVER give up on our noble mission. And I must say, even with this very dark cloud hanging over our nation, it's those freedom-loving patriots like YOU who are my source of courage, hope, and my UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA. But how could we ever give up on America? She is the freest and greatest country in history. She is a beacon of hope to the world that through hard work and perseverance, anything is possible. So, whenever I'm asked, "Sir, why keep fighting? Why not just walk away and never have to think about these witch hunts ever again?" My answer is simple... Even after FOUR unlawful INDICTMENTS against me as an innocent man, even with Crooked Joe and his accomplices trying to JAIL me for hundreds of years, I will remain right where I belong: between YOU and the entrenched Deep State that hates our country. Because walking away would mean condemning America to a lifetime of Third World Marxist tyranny. Not on my watch, Friend. I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left's tyranny! If you 're struggling due to the crooks and thugs who are running our country right now, then do not donate. I mean it! Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come roaring back. You have my word. But if you can contribute, then God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Riley Gaines
subject: Can I loop you in?
body:
I knew it wouldn’t be easy

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqilebhq497glu33c496fesmre1lvnued3m7spug_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim0o74c1h2bs "New Message From: Riley Gaines")
---

_**[Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women's sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhatkmvln75b1cpp1qaucsr7t0k21as6vqrhha90_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim0o74c1h2bs "Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women’s sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn. ")**_

I grew up swimming and was blessed to receive a scholarship to the University of Kentucky. It was all a dream come true... _Until it wasn 't._

When a 6'4 male walked into our locker room. Myself and other young women were expected to carry on business as usual, but I didn't stand for it.

I immediately left the locker room and asked a pool official how it was allowed to happen. I was told they "got around that," and it was okay. **That 's where my outrage began.**

Any man, coach, or official could have full access by making the locker rooms unisex. We weren't warned. We were subjected. And to rub salt into the wound, I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I've experienced the fear. I've experienced the sadness. I've experienced what Democrats think is "no big deal." And now, because I didn't stand for it and spoke up for women and girls everywhere, I have a target on my back.

Unfortunately for them, it has only empowered me. _**[My mission to save women's sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what's happening in women's sports is only the beginning.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb4l8kbioidagapga086ljr9lbf0636hjplevtng_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim0o74c1h2bs "My mission to save women’s sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning.")**_

The woke, transgender agenda won't stop.

I refuse to let this journey end. I refuse to bow down because they want me to. _**[I'm asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2hfv0n407bneqkt58289bmuu3jek7n7qgrmcqvo_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim0o74c1h2bs "I’m asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports.")**_

Can I count on you?

Thank you,

Riley

---
| |

* * *
---
| | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zstpcbpdi9fpkqf25b2m703rvi98jaqssi66em3o_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim0o74c1h2bs "Marsha Image Footer")
---
| |
_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkbb79p5hun1di08ro3s8a1g0fuh44f51a7daung_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim0o74c1h2bs "please, click here to support my efforts if you can.")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn
---
| | [SUPPORT MY FIGHT](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zebue1pdse3enj7k2a1ovgigjn6jbp5cqm3c6h38_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim0o74c1h2bs "SUPPORT MY FIGHT")

_**Connecticut’s Limousine Liberals want to Ban gas cars and your personal choice. This is an attack on the poor, the middle class, and all working citizens who can barely pay today’s outrageous energy bills let alone afford $70,000 cars.**_
_**SPEAK OUT and BE HEARD**_
Join Senator Rob Sampson who is leading this fight and sign up for the Zoom or Written Testimony below

**Public Hearing Information:** Date: August 22, 2023
Time: 9:00 am
Hearing Link: https://ctdeep.zoom.us/j/81807291329
All persons interested in providing comments at the hearing must register at: **https://ctdeep.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZUld-6qpzopGN1HeEa0hX8pIHIl_2O3jWCm**
Written comments. Written comments on the proposal can still be provided. Comments should be submitted no later than 5 pm on August 23, 2023 via the eRegulations System (PR 2023-023) or by electronic mail to the Mobile Sources Group at **deep.mobilesources@ct.gov.**
| [Register to Testify ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=3ddf73c026&e=8763c56857)

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Republicans continue their attacks on voting rights while Democrats prepare to fight for all-important special elections … and everything else you need to know in the states
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, August 20th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKF5r2OkLd3hDyD9LMkG8MOVpRhC53CLu9QmsP9oTdNVai6V8df3iOUjeB6MKmnrRuMPslXvfa4fqzYiAp3TMt5bCN82CTwKdCkW4pPhobbchSS1LmZOHR0jyoO76wclbGmVgnGyllYYClvyzXBVWMXIL3QBHp66MDGrserNNuSfP5pAieZeoNO4-Muj_jjw7sdQrLrk1zs_PC17zALq5rlV1NlhVB2O1tg78dgBSCp-lYx21knwFdNqEsZ5qr5XL5zSeDSKobHn4XPM2Txtu1q7G0F3qJ5DT0w5C1jvj9b88r52wYhu4feqruNWHS4wG5T8gHKYz2EcnPHXOjwrxdApnhG47dcCCXAu4MrvwLSnsgJZzNZf70nvmfltJQzwjFBK1JMBw1EVLLphjZGFlOouya9wmtQwHHC-eb-Rx5MWRt9vDSpuTQ0UT6fOdJRcdXCb6SO92_bfRhpI4E4C-RBVVqEPxNvitBsgpKwDLB5buHlfwat1W3V_n4soIkKA4zQMJ_Pl-J4J6BEYOeazYBy/3yw/bxAwxdLCQiCFWxZsHjSfZw/h0/D2bBFOJm6Lgz2JZ_IHi36vH_Lw3a0FMFgjvowVJPpg4)
---
1️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ House Republicans pass their latest attack on voting rights **
In North Carolina, state Republicans passed a bill to create stricter mail-in voting rules and encourage partisan poll watchers. [**This measure chips away at equal access to the ballot →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDNClnthegaegMbidLNE7CRFVAQEQL3q0yrlLQY-WKiA7uRkwZzxoVsNP6nTYOV86hsdCBzA4m-x-9mcz3NMAw8HBWLB9cevXNrfms3Hv3HoXJGDC7JZryXxI8XwVOIXkHCKcVV-UgxJBR3mzhA80kbkgQ3jq5xIpsjx3MN3I54-0-Fy_IAhhlIvZtHxbRhTr7tEaXo0fElk6CqWHgMbvbV23wVUzoN89URj7ymTg9ww4reuwu2Os_eb70W9Itt3ph0q0A9La8gUEKWwvovV2uTjAZN-LrL9K7vKm1U4SVVE0gg6kSSNoJaRp-mPBq0EkGiqSgBOIWbKtVOPDvMYgogWRVwD5eiPkLKwNSMhzBkO3IzxWb1JWPK5Rm-7N969Xz4IbytxICoFj-uph0_4I9yFN9rmGPaVUNcctNcUtP2WI-TAjMEFjKhSzMcdayCpIHPxbmfNys4Y5QqN3AMddBZ1MmHu0ntFxO3qy4Qe-SOLPyeZVU8mndP1gRK-RZcXWCUfgp8o92DlmL03PYOpVp2INhLImvDsCnxnFaHmqi3NV_lRBD3TjLyCWKFMNu_atJ-24JTw6tJxFsXMc5FtXHzmCdlv45i_6HZKbk-Y5DduXt-PnElok0KwrlNGlqWmO4X6X0Y5K8IK3JfS05BuOB2CiQ-D0-QzpbLkne3YgqhOeSjS8cuSa2mzZj3I-aS1k8qDOtboyVKrv-jetJrgIzg_vA7Z6L4c154kGUDEJBqr0dT7k46bg_rHd_z43p4LDFQ/3yw/bxAwxdLCQiCFWxZsHjSfZw/h1/AvpWcVJ9S1-n9enrSoLMh6UPshiynL2eXSnc8uAQgLk)
2️⃣ **_Georgia:_ Trump indicted for his role in election interference **
In Georgia, Donald Trump faces his fourth indictment, with charges for his involvement in election interference and other serious crimes. [**The nature of the GA law could finally hold him accountable →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHzMDNF8L5Zi3XRpJDNg3tUMQJwOw6P-UKE3qUdzVtM_AnG_gF6NZ3VdEmeEbD2DqUEW55dKFZHPbGSEZ_XnyiTc03kirI859XXSDGtPhu7Rec9LgmxgP1OniYoelnKlc3HohPJuas7ue9tN35shPVkDzVVgrmBABDpI_ZnxD5s6b-e3018df9u67jtXnJl08WK_6Dw5Gwu5axnZeI8cfMZ9f1UPUQYZYQFm8UIh9h8tMHt9_LaGHd2RAGsPiLNbCFnw2ITU8LK9jChlDdq3tJGQEMcr_XjjC45ISdB1Vf-C4j4aFPCf4r_F7_0klubFYCIr96UICDvcDbOFwMJ5f9TGXaUUQXjBqtptk1iz7-h6EMCzy9Ng0LDm698p7q7oqApbKT855fsYqbEkTMwj7Khs6i89e8UaSZrhtCYKfVYk7sdvzf4P5DYpx-NmWR-kQ0RibK0wb54aM3QlUPGSTwTfoTSsAT50goC2U5Cdl7jz8_4nPE_GxYZnlFt9SuwOb_xj88ekjG8km-KSUR_oLWp4EsalVxcwBWCTNeMgkAzUVlCB8HyAVpod3MK1hivdZfUQiG0Ry6EE1Z2Psp-Wg43tN4nTek1WsG9m7Jr2P70OxefFzyfERslSYErams8btpByVpAL-51S4GfcWztJ-1p7J0uh89OQpMxht1WuQtS-rTs0FoWG9o3hBk6tFaNb0p3SNYAweor1D5AWy5SaPkdl/3yw/bxAwxdLCQiCFWxZsHjSfZw/h2/xAB3Pk3zj-HOwG2gJnqeKWXv0BGAi2jTfzwxD8Gfgy8)
3️⃣ **_Courts Watch:_ A federal appeals court restricts access to abortion medication **
In a new ruling, the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals has challenged access to reproductive health care by restricting access to medication abortion. [**For now, the drug will remain available as litigation continues →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EOxeSEl3dZJDNCHt3ndRGK22zDzKAFt8uDOI7xNE-P-9JBf-5M1Xo1_1IN8dF8TqDt7gsFShJYw86Dqm2iG7qIjTNVebixhS1mxLv3OcU-xCmENsqLfxdF1OrUECM-1OZm414RuKm7cn4WZYJJuhT3KrS7---Y4PMXFK0BYYfDMIMU0GabKtx8DoXrNSCVf7Yaez_tABJxBvdWZqjENC9bMUU88K6fo4sBk1inOidxUciaKwBpPTOpsGndtUNeSoCArmkUt5YDBUvVqQFyQ6n2CsSJaGmb8g7ps72ZnjjyBS83G2_VwbZHajyIH5ECXY-03oWFTVfpzD1ZgJnp0bSn3HqU3zt7N0Cf7WATmyZs-xyhqq1ITc_hxD5LXGF5kL7VXTw8EuwkNbfva838fTHV6307e_UEs6Rcmgw5Rv3uZA9CSgGjYutCs6nB9SQQBwbsirU3ivG8gHxpLJKFewxc0GUopvR8M5qdAiZQUutn3HqpX7l56mLTgRLUIdeVMBDOBh19weTsnrmZH50Dd60b7LHIsdAqNW7h6ABBedsk6Go7gRrzcUXw6g7yuUOkMgnnrXcuRiys59j-ooVMVDa9EIhHnbvDFll54rQs1mBzuH_z9LezA05hGKma5UPCVU0EODBF2nZ0wf2S8yojqfFi_CqP7GF0aOpF1dlKCShXu3hofcQ2AtnKDBm3DLfjY3JU/3yw/bxAwxdLCQiCFWxZsHjSfZw/h3/KQPWqqBQ2c18pBGewN9GgKwmUsW_nB28-VmsN7PqEmU)
4️⃣ **_Claim your sticker:_ The votes are in, and the winning sticker is here! **
We tallied the votes, and our winning sticker is yours with a donation of any amount to the DLCC. [**Not only will you secure your very own “I Voted Local” sticker, you will help elect state Democrats nationwide →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqfeNIAsm2S2-3Y213jJhHBFnEu8_Jsi7ZwWD1JAev00EXpLpsEnl73JHMOtuRvj8Vzje2CvuwiVodKfZIyGAIdbsuZ6pFGfiuIjjCQn5TnlFke4P03so8QaQ_26enOfVWADhx3mp_kUej1xsc-GJSCDgU9ePfvb-gMWKfPiX9YmXeQVZxskZo6mefjd1fvWTom9-D7DSu4k_IdYBN-4rxAphaP4tAkP-g1HMYwPTewoZLDOxFnWXbgRCDfEtKNCXBwNMAV3oNRKUfKiYZUfikWdjR_m6R-L_yd1n8vvIPv1cRcr1dLvL7iQTYDWaX3L4WRiJk0moN9ZLu3_SSOPa3oMAtcUMjIeLxE5Wt14UayY4qmPieo1dezpvVewRkjZwNVqphIUpXGyCulP44sMMCCUAlGh6do2TA5FRQTMw3G9tSkZX97h6ENIFElv8URluu1ZixXzK8LRgqursjcyuWkHtOnkU-gW9vQcjz5xAeCgobhGH8BA2a5WZLhAT5hyqx9Ew-HfeYg5pTaFEdOg06xJnzAfIYmIwsJliNjKbGS6c4AjednjY5urkBPz5QEeX-qh1sb4lPEGXHu2TiTJSE46pAARQDiMfoQdTx3XFL2MGng5XQqc2VL_eUkdX00e62u0m9ZoKkPPl-SwRHmEKteOsvuGyufMLP90PvPEBRWDw_ogxajvOmDcnQFWzill4/3yw/bxAwxdLCQiCFWxZsHjSfZw/h4/UQMK-8nvaDGOU_QCxqj4zRtTCC5YrTE4gc3GdS5nBfE)
**🗳️ _Special Elections:_ Democrats prepare for upcoming races next week and beyond **
Next Tuesday is the New Hampshire special election, and there are several more over the next two months in states like Tennessee, and Pennsylvania, so [**we’re calling on grassroots Dems to help power our candidates to victory →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZ4znX1V30AzyoPQGNX0DNOrpQrWfgyixPAKiajy55ZVcdVLGeOCox28FjKJRbc-AXhMeTw7T8K-eqkKKXUIOlUW-BNhbmY5lDAq-J9mAAFPf-utHqGZ6muAqinWkutRwK9I3zrmyAYR0gbN9tC8b_2AeAz2h-661QUDF6Mn5ahLC9B67RzyPT0F76Qvu0cwBIkoEaACBgYX8BR3NItJJuvcNttP5JJSU5y0JcKpQA3b5zCmiOIes9_HVvP8LK0QE-5s98cRSQz_34n-gqBlIRT1q4diVqSn4hTdoAO07ybSCTJl9FFpl20ODciTSF8yI7F-j4QKwQFUoorU18yUIwSkpmsAA889CygsxQryWlv9F1pP1BXaCocxciUigZzt_PQaiEkxG5Fqs2mtuHRnJvkS6krLSSTr0DXecgN02Z5n5eNzTcRFiPpFB9vTQASnxWTgaOVCj58Nfl74TnhYj5DIgrmLYx6PPXetqD4x7qhCuXQRGWi-RhCPCCXcW4V8yM-fgwCIDd5Baeici-2X0dU-oPd-iN9S4tdK6QOfNcWX-NgG3cPMIf8JdgDyQvgh4O/3yw/bxAwxdLCQiCFWxZsHjSfZw/h5/LLaXFGxbPxPtcjzoB4QgxEtKZcdjm7JnubSpeewglek)

clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, August 20th, 2023 | | | | | | 1️⃣ North Carolina: House Republicans pass their latest attack on voting rights In North Carolina, state Republicans passed a bill to create stricter mail-in voting rules and encourage partisan poll watchers. 2️⃣ Georgia: Trump indicted for his role in election interference In Georgia, Donald Trump faces his fourth indictment, with charges for his involvement in election interference and other serious crimes. 3️⃣ Courts Watch: A federal appeals court restricts access to abortion medication In a new ruling, the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals has challenged access to reproductive health care by restricting access to medication abortion. 4️⃣ Claim your sticker: The votes are in, and the winning sticker is here! name: John
subject: In a serious predicament
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Fellow Patriot, I hope this email finds you well. I urgently need to get in touch with you as my situation just became more serious.

My name is John James, a Christian, conservative combat veteran with a mission to restore strong leadership to Washington, D.C.. Just as I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq to defeat the enemy, I am now serving again to protect our country from the dangers of radical socialism.

I know you’re just like me. You want the best for this nation and to preserve a future for our children.

The Beltway's Democrat Machine is prepared to spend millions to silence my voice. They HATE that a black conservative is challenging their hypocritical narrative on race.[ **If I’m going to stay in the fight, I need to humbly ask for your support.** ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=a685df8bc5c840d4b5067d9736108698&_e=Lz1lT3-9KQwS-kZNHBDMR3JtGbvu4I9-fBZ2lrJum3Y24w0HwBpaZS4snvOcRR8e-ii1YVXOYMZgK8QJkn0OT8pdGdrwwIPmXRzAKjfJuOTJKqGcEuaDipJcKFDSxPo8QgyRGMyg67Lixi7115iYiDAV0Ph-Kt47kW_xg9lcufkBgYVAWZ-HWrQrCXYz8wCKZC_JBalwI7-CMepdL3T6y9jWyXMrRwxIIy9R8o29yH1n_cDJg_45kAcQAM36Oo8Doic_jkUpthH5LsWaNHC46PG9x9iEHGVa7-eEHaDrfq_-gZmFarRxt_BzOYtRzgQ3pUW13PedDZS1RRN0VdDxbydB-5Waiz4YzMX3-Eo-xOpNlpK7bUcPueXYpcQ5X1XjsvLICvMOt_e4W3lvFyQLReG0YFokM8objpFxl_NPkG92anFN_x40rE-y9HFQAIZ2WqdW_r-qoA74W28VLAC8Hz42LTf-d-RBqIq4pSjPDY3gvMZLY3hjNtdsfyk3GyO7)

My name is John James, a Christian, conservative combat veteran with a mission to restore strong leadership to Washington, D.C.. Just as I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq to defeat the enemy, I am now serving again to protect our country from the dangers of radical socialism. I know you’re just like me. You want the best for this nation and to preserve a future for our children. The Beltway's Democrat Machine is prepared to spend millions to silence my voice. They HATE that a black conservative is challenging their hypocritical narrative on race. I humbly request that you consider pitching in just a few bucks today to provide the essential support needed to carry us through the finish line. Your contribution can make all the difference. name: Riley Gaines
subject: Can I loop you in?
body:
I knew it wouldn’t be easy

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21980%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jnK76uTVdY6peteXoMEp0A&sysid=1 "New Message From: Riley Gaines")
---

_**[Friend, my name is Riley Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women’s sports with the help of Senator Marsha Blackburn.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21981%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WVPBCiByFI%2b5j1PWgjnFVQ&sysid=1 "Friend, my name is Riley
Gaines, and I want to loop you into my mission to SAVE women’s sports with the
help of Senator Marsha Blackburn. ")**_

I grew up swimming and was blessed to receive a scholarship to the University of Kentucky. It was all a dream come true... _Until it wasn’t._

When a 6’4 male walked into our locker room. Myself and other young women were expected to carry on business as usual, but I didn’t stand for it.

I immediately left the locker room and asked a pool official how it was allowed to happen. I was told they “got around that,” and it was okay. **That’s where my outrage began.**

Any man, coach, or official could have full access by making the locker rooms unisex. We weren’t warned. We were subjected. And to rub salt into the wound, I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I’ve experienced the fear. I’ve experienced the sadness. I’ve experienced what Democrats think is “no big deal.” And now, because I didn’t stand for it and spoke up for women and girls everywhere, I have a target on my back.

Unfortunately for them, it has only empowered me. _**[My mission to save women’s sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21982%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Te%2fYu4BmIh%2f%2flI6avraQDg&sysid=1 "My mission to save women’s
sports has become bigger than I ever imagined. The American people are waking up
and seeing that what’s happening in women’s sports is only the beginning.")**_

The woke, transgender agenda won’t stop.

I refuse to let this journey end. I refuse to bow down because they want me to. _**[I’m asking you today to stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21983%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QutxQRqd3FZdOjKrLH9WjA&sysid=1 "I’m asking you today to
stand with me and Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women’s sports.")**_

Can I count on you?

Thank you,

Riley

---
| |

* * *
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21984%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3FxhRgi8OdW5JX1VPvbVOQ&sysid=1 "Marsha Image Footer")
---
| |
_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That’s why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21995%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vQ75fZgTwGwqAOYunaBelg&sysid=1 "please, click here to
support my efforts if you can. ")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn
---
| | [SUPPORT MY FIGHT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c21984%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3FxhRgi8OdW5JX1VPvbVOQ&sysid=1 "SUPPORT MY FIGHT")
---

Brentwood, TN 37024

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Official Extension: Make your MATCHED National Honeybee Day gift before it’s too late
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend. Yesterday, we fell seriously short of our National Honey Bee Day goal. Now, we have one last chance to close the fundraising gap and avoid DISASTER for pollinators and our fragile planet. **
Here’s why your matched gift is so critical right now: Chemical corporations are POISONING the precious bees we rely on and risking the future of our food system. Friends of the Earth is fighting back against these companies and their out-of-control pesticide pollution. **But any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits.** We can’t let that happen.
With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to **EXTEND this once-a-year Honey Bee Day match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY.** So we had to reach out to you while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for bees and our planet.
| ⚠️ **DONATION STATUS UPDATE** | **EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS: ****EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m. **
** NATIONAL HONEY BEE DAY GOAL: FALLING SHORT**
**DONORS NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA:** **4**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m._
---
To be totally honest, friend, we’re worried. **We set our goal of hitting $107,000 before our National Honey Bee Day deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to raise to continue this urgent fight.** We've got a no-nonsense budget, and every dollar has a job to do – whether that's mobilizing communities on the ground, advocating for bee-safe farming practices or putting pressure on Big Ag to clean up its act before it's too late.
**If we fall short, this work gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in polluted farm fields, MORE pollinator deaths and alarming consequences for human health. **
Globally, we're already seeing a drop in bee-pollinated fruits, veggies and nuts. Researchers say this decrease of healthy foods could potentially lead to almost 500,000 excess deaths per year! We can't afford to stand back and let pesticide companies put our bees and our communities in danger. **That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect these tiny pollinators, the ecosystems they maintain, and our planet. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. **
[**Please, rush your $27 membership gift now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at midnight tonight, and every dollar will be doubled – up to $107,000 – to power the fight for our only Earth!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937894?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937895?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937897?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

Thank you for your urgent support,

Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science
Friends of the Earth

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Anything?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter -
Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make your first donation to Ruben Gallego as we approach the 7 month anniversary of launching his campaign for Senate?
What if we told you that Senator Sinema has more than $10 MILLION in the bank? That’s a huge amount for anyone, and especially someone who hasn’t even announced their campaign yet.
And what if we told you these goals are not arbitrary, they are what we need to hit to show our strength and WIN this race?
$3 may not sound like the kind of money that can compete with Sinema’s millions, but lots and lots of people are chipping in as you read this.
Now they hope you’ll do the same. Please.
[**Can you contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate? Help us catch up on our goals as we approach this important milestone.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230820-1-f&t=1&akid=970%2E734936%2E74diTV)

Thank you. A million thank you's. This donation means a lot. Please know that.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidtorres4congress/together-we-can-make-a-difference-9391338?e=56e02d6e28)
---
[](https://davidtorres4congress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0874d556c8360c59de0b9a40e&id=c4a4e83301&e=56e02d6e28)

Dear Supporters, Friends, and Family,
I hope this letter finds you well. It is with extreme sorrow that I write to you today to share a decision that was not made lightly. After much consideration and reflection, I have come to the difficult conclusion thatI will be withdrawing my candidacy for Colorado's 5th Congressional District.
This journey has been an incredible experience, one that I embarked upon with a deep commitment to serving our community and advocating for the values that matter most to us. Throughout this campaign, I have been fortunate enough to receive unwavering support from individuals like you who believe in the power of change and the potential for a brighter future. Your dedication and enthusiasm have been a driving force that I will forever be grateful for.
Regrettably, I must address the disappointing lack of support our campaign received from the local Democratic Party. This disheartening situation began with the perplexing judgment of character displayed by party organizers dating back to the 2022 caucus. I share this not to dwell on setbacks because despite these challenges, your unwavering belief in my vision propelled me forward. I mention this only to encourage all of you, especially the younger generation, to amplify your presence and engagement in politics regardless of pushback. Over the past few years, I've had the privilege of meeting numerous individuals who possess the desire, intellect, and capability to become ideal candidates for elevating the representation of this community. This community deserves and requires more, and it's crucial that you play an active role in driving that positive change and do what I was ultimately unable to.
However, the decision to step back from this endeavor stems from a deeply personal place. As much as I am committed to serving our community, I must prioritize the health and well-being of my family and myself at this time. This choice was not reached without difficulty, yet I am convinced that it is essential for the overall welfare of my loved ones and myself.
To each and every one of you who stood by my side throughout this journey – from my supporters to my family and friends – please accept my deepest gratitude. Your unwavering belief in me, your countless hours of volunteering, your financial contributions, and your words of encouragement have touched me deeply. It is your dedication that reaffirms my belief in the power of community and the potential for positive change.
Although my political aspirations are being paused for now,I want you to know that my quest to serve my community has only just begun. The passion and energy that you've poured into this campaign will not go to waste.I am committed to finding new and effective ways to make a positive impact and contribute to the betterment of the community.
For those of you who generously donated to the 2024 campaign, please know that your contributions will be refunded in full as I have requested them through ActBlue. I hope this gets completed ASAP. Your support has been invaluable, and I want to ensure that your investment is returned as a token of my appreciation so that you may use these funds to support a candidate that you believe in which I am confident will emerge.
As my social media sites, emails, and website will not be up for much longer, please feel free to reach out to me directly via text at 719-256-0113 anytime. I am eager to stay connected and continue our conversations about how we can work together to make a difference.
Once again, thank you for being the incredible force behind my campaign. Your support has meant the world to me, and I am excited to see where our paths lead us next.
With heartfelt gratitude and warm regards,

|
---

body:
I need to ask for your help

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=877712f091b243dfb26f0fa9d4ef079b&_e=lT5JtZm_I3wjCQqgZ5p00hZcYwupZHIEe6oHMkYD3m4znj_WWg5GT7cKYnJfzSM8jDPwp4v1hxzcEFpIjO15Mf4Y2nmElztOq10uOyFyhzxiVUgS7t88-J1hDxLXV_8CrNlgd6sKojbG8V3gOTJZ4A6GId_P1k0wWtaviIEfkm-jy2RlRKAlgRQkXbE77WDy3DdMJA6k7Y5ngCICK1mAkFjnxlG02yaRF94APWhLuWcx3gTh9D2o7g1o-1qN7o4XAUFu1tEq75-1ERwhfuvEMH4CTYS4FqLy-NTptECih6D5qT-m1qcu9dEw5D7YSNHe)

I used to defuse underwater mines big enough to sink an aircraft carrier, so a mob of radical-left Dems doesn't even make me flinch.

Fellow Patriot, this is Captain Hung Cao, retired Navy Special Operations Officer & I need to ask for your help.

One month ago I announced that I'm officially running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia. But Fellow Patriot, I didn't see your response.

Truth is, I'm running again because I'm not done fighting for this country.

I fled communist oppression in Vietnam and forged a life for myself through the American Dream.

I owe this country my life. Serving as a U.S. Senator would be the least that I could do. But the Democrat establishment doesn't want to see that happen.

**They HATE that I 'm an immigrant who made a name for myself without their victim mentality. I'm a threat to their entire narrative, which is why they'll spend MILLIONS of dollars to shut me down.**

My campaign could be over before it even gets off the ground.

**[If you're going to give $5 or $10 this election cycle - make it count, make it today. name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Can you lend a hand?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
It’s not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I’ve identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=e8754e950e584e0baa5523bca90250cb&_t=qiLtNd43nmx_Ztb3t0CkSnKv4qKBZYyDj73VjBUVKLJonkeSnqTkwIqS13tAj-zYyUshe6CWRH_t2wD9sQz_k_wfpTC5D2odvGyT2uuVhHQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=e8754e950e584e0baa5523bca90250cb&_t=qiLtNd43nmx_Ztb3t0CkSnKv4qKBZYyDj73VjBUVKLJonkeSnqTkwIqS13tAj-zYyUshe6CWRH_t2wD9sQz_k_wfpTC5D2odvGyT2uuVhHQ%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

name: David Hogg via Blue Amp Action
subject: Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated...
body:
This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7fb20c69-815c-4037-b6ec-0604d59865cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. [We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta209df92-0444-48ad-bc1d-e9d1f389ba8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87deda8e-2d53-44ab-b760-1fb134d9dcdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong, Peter. [That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4bb66451-d7cf-4aa6-886f-a6c0f83be9e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26fef1db-3ffe-4f7d-8794-079d2c7298a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/leaderswedeserve2308_copy1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d78ca8c4-3f48-4aa2-9223-f181bdb576fd&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=d78ca8c4-3f48-4aa2-9223-f181bdb576fd&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | = The extremist book banning Moms for Liberty co-founder, Tiffany Justice, stated at their annual conference this summer that they are planning to contest school board races nationwide. Now that the candidate filing deadline has passed in New Jersey, the race is heating up, and we need to get resources to pro-education candidates ASAP. We have set a fundraising goal of $50k by the end of the month; if we hit that goal we could get $500 to 100 different candidates across the state. | | = = Thank you, Districts for Democracy * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu2e1h28boaft7ge7isc7gc2brss7uvp0e7r89h0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ljqtgabh65tol7e3u7qeq6rv02mnge4i092sp8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6nee3tqel5g8h8c5qkco05f16q893utgm0c2158_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zav0cl3c9e51piu28a585bpebqp66rfsft33o2sg_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**
---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkl664h89ihkv9tjdtuv6iqdfoo2nmajcbb6vid0_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS")
---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkcph3m87krinr1ms8in5vmhb7o12piojcojvls8_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy
---
| |

* * *

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8h3l0c5vfbv0q2umgo7smgb2ae2kufgaca8jfmg_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "Never Give Up: Donate now!")
_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zln6bicgrt4ls29hu9p0rndk55sdug085n4fi038_rp22sh2s8i66p72clim2ob6clh2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

Thank you,

Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy

body:
We're running strong, while they're running scared. Biden's Corporate Dems panic as RFK, Jr. surges.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_s_corporate_dems_unopens&n=1)
---
Peter, For the past 4 months, corporate Democrats have launched the biggest smear campaign in the history of American politics against Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. Since he announced his race for the White House, the legacy media and Democratic “consultants” have called him every name in the book and tried to tarnish his reputation. **The attacks aren't working and now the DNC and their aligned PACs are hitting the panic button**. That’s right, corporate Dems are finally admitting that “Biden is TANKING”. This week, friends of the campaign received a desperate email from a corporate Dem-aligned Turnout PAC that Mr. Kennedy is surging in the polls,**admit that Biden’s chances are sinking.** **Screenshot from Biden’s Corporate Democrat TURNOUT PAC:** **President Biden and his corporate PAC allies are running scared!** Peter, we need your help today to keep building our campaign to get our message to every town and city across America. **[Chip in today to help put RFK, Jr. in the White House!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_s_corporate_dems_unopens&n=2)** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_s_corporate_dems_unopens&n=3 "Give $5 ->") [Give $5 ->](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_s_corporate_dems_unopens&n=3)

name: Diana
subject: I don't see your response... --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because polls show President Biden statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 89 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230820-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRFV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230820-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRFV1-Pros-sl1&akid=11676%2E9716520%2EKrY1Ic)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230820-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRFV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230820-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRFV1-Pros-sl1&akid=11676%2E9716520%2EKrY1Ic)

Diana

name: Laura Gillen
subject: Reclaiming Our District →
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY

I’m running to reclaim our district and bring back strong representation in Congress in 2024.

| Peter,

As a lifelong resident of this community, I’m worried about the direction we’re heading. Anthony D’Esposito is out of touch with the priorities of the hardworking families on Long Island.

I’m running to reclaim our district and bring back strong representation in Congress in 2024. I’m committed to getting to work on day one and prioritizing the safety of our children, putting food on the table for families, and ensuring my constituents plant their roots here for generations to come.

name: Sean Barry for TX via ActionNetwork.org
subject: Regardless of success.
body:
| | | Friend, My campaign for Congress seeks to improve the lives of my constituents regardless of electoral success. **We’re running a service-based, community-focused campaign that is**** _for_****the people.** I wanted to thank you for taking the time to learn more about myself and my campaign this week. A little more about myself:
* I was trained in Mechanical Engineering
* I am passionate about public service
* I know that I can provide effective, alternative solutions to improve our district.

**I can feel the anger and frustration here in our district.** I will bring leadership and organization to mobilize the most active citizens to pressure officials and companies to listen to our needs. Please feel free to [check out my website](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOH8vS-H2wVKd-2YocowzUKrXWCSRx4faretlqqLhuNprCVA9vDFKtqF-3nQqWIz7OwcYACjaA_XeUMYUq5Lo8sFkV7EvIDryW69ZBIRSzZ-Wep8tD8tHhWf3Iey3C9FATPtHOM8Qu_M0kfwgXQFNDtFTUGS-63aQJvHKpDZyxFI6hJHRxwD7PZQQ4cT68i_HLM5ESq-z5acj2aUACwr7iUBp4EhdjI7tKafcJts5MKmJQ4DTUwSnpub-EzC2N3orw/3yw/EFZozFj7Sgm-OZAuYhZ1gQ/h0/tnaU_90mLNOIgUtP3ciyJaOEwbcANFNjQtzPrymaaZM) to learn more about my plans for:
* Improving our Infrastructure
* Healthcare
* Police Reform
* Abortion Access

For far too long, things have remained the same. We have the resources to change this, but we need to start our support now. I know we can do it. Thank you for your time! Sean Barry - Candidate for Congress, TX-29 [Follow me on Twitter](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhvKvF23nMWYkeCgP0UfX7pCEscdcAj-jlOwn6JC5vfV55SDJkhwGUHC1yFFE3pn5AjX_-4IVLaLzfsexvLHmK5Pz216YyUSc-BXkrvxDgDa7as_rXTIY1R-zIsKiOz90aX3wCkK2W4TKguCw3FeKZEOzKczU_RGEzyw-qCXumkMCKB2WJODoBm_SoIdWs6SBN_jvbQM1rpdYpyKABzjNlXgUQWKPXGSqA4KOhdAs2XBa/3yw/EFZozFj7Sgm-OZAuYhZ1gQ/h1/PBYdFfNVU8NOsBs4x2AC4s7bZopdvU4bvrcXv7Gs0iY)!
* * *
Elect Sean Barry 9519 Swanpond Ct Houston, TX 77075

---

name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?

JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%

This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive
race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have
the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will
have to fight like hell to make it happen.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1001&akid=3504%2E346206%2EhdBjaw ]Will you step up today and split a contribution between Charles Booker
and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national
Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our fundraising goal.

Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that
early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.

And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark
money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts.
Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more
supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will
come.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1002&akid=3504%2E346206%2EhdBjaw ]Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in -- split with
Charles Booker -- to help us build up as much small-dollar support as
possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national
Republicans throw our way.

CHIP IN →

It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.

—Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1003&akid=3504%2E346206%2EhdBjaw ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230820-3504-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3504_346206_hdBjaw&akid=3504%2E346206%2EhdBjaw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3504%2E346206%2EhdBjaw

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Kevin Thomas
subject: A few moments I’ll never forget.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Kevin Thomas
body:
I’m excited to share them with you. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372325/422856705/1420976906?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)

| **_[Kevin Thomas recently launched his campaign for Congress to retake NY-04 from MAGA Republicans and flip a must-win seat for Democrats in 2024. Please read his note below and click here to become one of Kevin’s very first grassroots endorsers >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372326/422856708/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)_** | **[ENDORSE KEVIN THOMAS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372328/422856711/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)**
---
* * *
Team, there are some dates in life that you’ll never forget. These are a few moments that have shaped who I am and what I will become.
**1995:**
I was 10 years old when my family immigrated to the United States. I witnessed firsthand the significance of the freedom and opportunities provided by this nation. My story is a New York story—the story of the immigrant triumphing over challenges in the pursuit of the American dream. Today, that dream is in danger from the far-right movement.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372336/422856712/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)
**November 6, 2018:**

I defied every pundit and party leader’s expectations when I defeated a 40-year Republican incumbent in a historic race for the New York Senate. As a result, I became the first Indian-American to ever serve in the Senate. I went from protecting New Yorkers in the courtroom to now having their backs in the state legislature.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372339/422856723/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)
**November 18, 2018:**

Just a few days later, my wife Rincy and I were blessed with the arrival of our beautiful daughter, Layla. This renewed my deep-seated determination to create a brighter future for every child and family in New York. And that's why I'm passionately committed to fighting for the future I desire for my daughter— from addressing gun violence and the climate crisis to making sure Layla grows up in a world where she can make decisions about her own body.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372343/422856726/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)
**July 26, 2023:**

The day I launched my campaign for Congress. I couldn’t be more grateful to have overwhelming support from local community members across New York’s 4th Congressional District. I’ve taken on Republican extremists & the party machine – and I won. I know that this people-powered movement is strong enough to take down my dangerous MAGA opponent, Anthony D’Esposito.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372344/422856731/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)
**November 5, 2024:**

On this day, the American people will face another incredibly important choice. And it’s one of the toughest challenges I’ve ever faced. **The key to flipping the House runs right through this state – right through _this_ district.** So you can surely bet that Kevin McCarthy and his army of Republican donors will do everything in their power to stop us.

But I have faith in our people-powered campaign.
**_[That's why I'm reaching out for your help. Your support is vital to winning this essential race for Democrats in 2024. Can I count on you to join our growing people-powered movement by becoming one of my official grassroots endorsers today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372347/422856732/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)_**
**[ENDORSE KEVIN THOMAS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68372348/422856733/-241262305?refcode=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWQ1MzYzOC02YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sOWhHX8SF5-6ImsBYJROczPcBcsxvzKjm8aSudXiusw=&emci=97634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bad53638-6a3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)**

Thank you for your support,

Kevin Thomas
Democrat for Congress, NY-04

clean_body: I’m excited to share them with you. | | | Team, there are some dates in life that you’ll never forget. These are a few moments that have shaped who I am and what I will become. 1995: I was 10 years old when my family immigrated to the United States. I witnessed firsthand the significance of the freedom and opportunities provided by this nation. My story is a New York story—the story of the immigrant triumphing over challenges in the pursuit of the American dream. Today, that dream is in danger from the far-right movement. November 6, 2018: I defied every pundit and party leader’s expectations when I defeated a 40-year Republican incumbent in a historic race for the New York Senate. As a result, I became the first Indian-American to ever serve in the Senate. I went from protecting New Yorkers in the courtroom to now having their backs in the state legislature. November 18, 2018: Just a few days later, my wife Rincy and I were blessed with the arrival of our beautiful daughter, Layla. This renewed my deep-seated determination to create a brighter future for every child and family in New York. And that's why I'm passionately committed to fighting for the future I desire for my daughter— from addressing gun violence and the climate crisis to making sure Layla grows up in a world where she can make decisions about her own body. July 26, 2023: The day I launched my campaign for Congress. I couldn’t be more grateful to have overwhelming support from local community members across New York’s 4th Congressional District. I’ve taken on Republican extremists & the party machine – and I won. I know that this people-powered movement is strong enough to take down my dangerous MAGA opponent, Anthony D’Esposito. November 5, 2024: On this day, the American people will face another incredibly important choice. And it’s one of the toughest challenges I’ve ever faced. The key to flipping the House runs right through this state – right through this district. So you can surely bet that Kevin McCarthy and his army of Republican donors will do everything in their power to stop us. But I have faith in our people-powered campaign. Thank you for your support, Kevin Thomas Democrat for Congress, NY-04 | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. He has devoted his career to protecting vulnerable New Yorkers, both in the courtroom and the State Senate. If Democrats want any shot at taking back the House next year, we need to flip this TOSS-UP seat. = | = = Follow along:** Paid for by Friends of Kevin Thomas Friends of Kevin Thomas 410 Jericho Turnpike #200 Jericho, NY 11753 If you no longer want to receive emails from us, click here to

body:

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

We’re only in August, the attacks against me and the Left’s attempts to interfere in our MUST-WIN election are only going to get worse. | Democrats are seeing the same polling data we’re seeing. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I call ‘em like I see ‘em
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
McCarthy’s violent threats won’t go unchecked on my watch.
| Friend,

You know me. You've helped me. **You have my back — and I have yours.**

So it probably doesn't surprise you that when Kevin McCarthy threatened to fight me on the House Floor recently, I told him what I thought of him. And when he dared me to say it again, **I repeated what I thought of him.**

Look: These MAGA losers prefer violence over votes. They think you and I will back down. _We won't._ **Freedom and democracy is worth defending. I'll defend it every day.**

[_We can send Kevin McCarthy home and make him the shortest-serving Speaker ever. Split a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project to get McCarthy and his playground posse out of Congress for good in 2024._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51637?t=6&akid=9953%2E878179%2EDJ7e4k) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51638?t=7&akid=9953%2E878179%2EDJ7e4k)

clean_body: McCarthy’s violent threats won’t go unchecked on my watch. | Friend, You know me. You've helped me. You have my back — and I have yours. So it probably doesn't surprise you that when Kevin McCarthy threatened to fight me on the House Floor recently, I told him what I thought of him. And when he dared me to say it again, I repeated what I thought of him. Look: These MAGA losers prefer violence over votes. They think you and I will back down. We won't. Freedom and democracy is worth defending. I'll defend it every day. Hi folks – when I was serving as Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, this beautiful pup was left abandoned near my office. 🐶

Stray pups like this one _(who we named Cappy, and now works with the Capitol Police!)_ remind me of the harm, abuse, and neglect many animals face – and it’s why I took action as Auditor General to keep them safe.

Back in 2011, Pennsylvania had one of the worst reputations in the country for allowing puppy mills to operate unchecked, so the Legislature passed a new law to put a stop to them.

But when I audited the department responsible for enforcing the law, I found an *intentional* lack of enforcement of the state’s dog law and a misuse of funds – _all of which meant there was little impact to alleviate puppy mill conditions. I wasn’t about to let that stand, not on my watch._

**So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work. I recommended 18 actions for the department to help protect our pups.**

After that audit, Pennsylvania rose from 36th to 15th in effectiveness of our animal cruelty laws – _the most improved state in 2017._

To continue those improvements, in 2020 I called on the Legislature to increase funding for animal protection law enforcement –because every dog deserves to be safe, healthy and well-cared for.

**[Together, we can continue the fight to stop puppy mills and animal cruelty in Pennsylvania. Will you chip in $10 or more to help me continue the fight for Pennsylvania’s four-legged friends?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68374259/422863642/-412144306?refcode=email_082023_protectpups_t2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODcwYWE4MC02ZTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwhnlvoAhu44DyFotablxSBRptON985mtUAU-v3eK4A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68374260/422863643/-412144306?refcode=email_082023_protectpups_t2&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODcwYWE4MC02ZTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wwhnlvoAhu44DyFotablxSBRptON985mtUAU-v3eK4A=)
