name: David Hogg
subject: I’m fed up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, yet Republicans refuse to act.

| Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun violence prevention advocate, and school shooting survivor.

When a former classmate entered Marjory Stoneman Douglas in 2018 and opened fire on my classmates, killing 17 people, my life and my community were forever altered.

**I saw the toll it took on myself, my classmates, and their families – _no child or community should ever have to endure that type of pain._**

That’s why I committed myself to standing up to NRA-backed politicians and fighting for gun violence prevention legislation, including an assault weapons ban. [_**So, will you join me in supporting Stop Gun Violence PAC and Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation to elect gun violence prevention advocates in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68374240/422863592/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230820-Z-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg3YjZiNjktNmUzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zDeiColyR-_QlozIhvMiuhDWbf5qVmkiyd7n_2PNmWA=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68374242/422863593/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230820-Z-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg3YjZiNjktNmUzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zDeiColyR-_QlozIhvMiuhDWbf5qVmkiyd7n_2PNmWA=)
---
Listen, I’m no stranger to criticism and harassment – even by elected officials like Marjorie Taylor Greene – but I will never stop fighting to ensure no other community goes through what my classmates and I did on February 14, 2018.

I’m also no stranger to being underestimated. After the shooting, people said that we couldn’t change gun laws because the NRA owned Florida, but we did. People then said well, young people won’t vote, but we did at the highest rates in US history and defeated more NRA-backed members of Congress than ever before. More recently, they said we could never elect Maxwell Frost, 25-year-old March For Our Lives organizer, but we did, and now he is the youngest member of Congress.

Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, **yet Republicans refuse to act.**

We can’t sit idly by while other schools and communities are rocked by gun violence – we must do better for our generation and the next. To do this, we must repurpose the mantra we learned during school shooter drills alongside our ABCs of Run, Hide, Fight. It is time for the school shooting generation to Run for office, refuse to Hide from the responsibility we have to protect the next generation, and Fight for a better future by voting and organizing to hold elected officials accountable.

[_**So will you consider contributing anything to support our efforts to elect gun violence prevention champions and kick NRA-backed politicians out of office?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68374243/422863597/-68786849?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230820-Z-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjg3YjZiNjktNmUzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zDeiColyR-_QlozIhvMiuhDWbf5qVmkiyd7n_2PNmWA=)

When a former classmate entered Marjory Stoneman Douglas in 2018 and opened fire on my classmates, killing 17 people, my life and my community were forever altered. I saw the toll it took on myself, my classmates, and their families – no child or community should ever have to endure that type of pain. That’s why I committed myself to standing up to NRA-backed politicians and fighting for gun violence prevention legislation, including an assault weapons ban. = | = Listen, I’m no stranger to criticism and harassment – even by elected officials like Marjorie Taylor Greene – but I will never stop fighting to ensure no other community goes through what my classmates and I did on February 14, 2018. I’m also no stranger to being underestimated. After the shooting, people said that we couldn’t change gun laws because the NRA owned Florida, but we did. People then said well, young people won’t vote, but we did at the highest rates in US history and defeated more NRA-backed members of Congress than ever before. More recently, they said we could never elect Maxwell Frost, 25-year-old March For Our Lives organizer, but we did, and now he is the youngest member of Congress. Gun reform, including universal background checks and an assault weapons ban, are supported by the majority of voters, yet Republicans refuse to act. We can’t sit idly by while other schools and communities are rocked by gun violence – we must do better for our generation and the next. To do this, we must repurpose the mantra we learned during school shooter drills alongside our ABCs of Run, Hide, Fight. It is time for the school shooting generation to Run for office, refuse to Hide from the responsibility we have to protect the next generation, and Fight for a better future by voting and organizing to hold elected officials accountable. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, David Hogg Gun Violence Survivor & Gun Violence Prevention Advocate * | | = PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC Stop Gun Violence PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | = If you do not wish to receive emails about this important movement to end gun violence, please

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
It’s not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I’ve identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=e1c83dfcd975436c9a21cd8f2401ce4f&_t=_Hh_G9mU4LMzd0jLVLKT2Ls5nRypjvBjKzROtqGeq4r7QX6C436GsMZ0trw6iY5-hfmD8-bCyUK0yrwU5_IsfaqVhPdaEpNISrTsDLY3dgY%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=e1c83dfcd975436c9a21cd8f2401ce4f&_t=_Hh_G9mU4LMzd0jLVLKT2Ls5nRypjvBjKzROtqGeq4r7QX6C436GsMZ0trw6iY5-hfmD8-bCyUK0yrwU5_IsfaqVhPdaEpNISrTsDLY3dgY%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor.

**Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. **His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: July Average Donation = $32.80
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vscbzJqDTN

Vivek 2024

This campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people
like you - not the Washington elite

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscbzJqDTN

$32.80
That was our average donation in
July, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign on
February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters
across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.
Because of your support, we've not only qualified for this
month's debate, but the next one too!

This campaign is proving that
building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington
insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them.
That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that
our message and solutions are what are going to revive our
nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To
keep this going and actually impact change, I need you to join me
and put some skin in the game with me.

Can I count on you to chip in $1,
$5, or even our average gift for last month - $32.80?

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $20 ➔

Chip in $32.80 ➔

This isn't just a political
campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic
pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our
purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of
your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from
conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a
grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the
Washington elite.

I will do what the other GOP
candidates appear afraid to even say but I need your help to
amplify our ideas and message.

Please add your voice to the
growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN $32.80
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iscbzJqDTN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscbzJqDTN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

| | **[_Why do you vote?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68376756/422872844/1968402685?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230820_e_votesurvey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGFmNjZlOC03NTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BrUcQPppx1GtrPB3_H0Ofv2_eOS0ox_00P5IfmvRHq4=&emci=daaf66e8-753f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=e0af66e8-753f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)** Here’s why we’re asking: It’s local election season here in Georgia and across the country, and responses from engaged voters like you can inspire others to make their voices heard, too. We get in gear for local elections because issues that directly impact our communities are on the ballot — including the quality of our schools, the maintenance of roads and bridges, the capacity to respond to natural disasters, and the budget of our police departments. The leaders we elect will be powerful decision-makers on these issues and more. So this year, next year, and beyond, we’ll keep pushing back when extremists try to silence our voices with voter suppression attempts. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Hillary Clinton knows something about Joe Biden that will sink his campaign
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 20, 2023

Hillary Clinton knows
something about Joe Biden that will sink his campaign

Hillary Clinton made a big
mistake back in 2016. President Biden is making the same one.

And now Hillary Clinton knows
something about Joe Biden that will sink his campaign.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Trump is nowhere to be
found after abruptly canceling historic event

Former President
Trump was about to crack his election case wide open. Now he's
missing in action.
➞ Continue Reading

This Democrat Senator made
a massive mistake that has all hell breaking loose

The Democrat Party
seems to trip over themselves with every chance they get. There
might not be a recovery from this misstep.
➞ Continue Reading

Donald Trump's campaign
gets dealt a devastating blow

So far, former
President Trump has been dodging bullets. But he's finally been
caught.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: We’ve got some bad news for Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Our campaign isn’t just about making a point — this is a race we can win.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley told reporters last week that he “defers to the voters” on protecting reproductive freedom in 2024, despite working for years to ban abortion in our state.
So let’s just review what Missouri voters have accomplished over the last several years — **and why their streak of taking back power at the ballot box spells bad news for Josh Hawley in this election cycle.**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35679?refcode=em20230820-3596&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3596%2E614464%2E3bZvT-)**
**2018 —** Missourians rejected an anti-union “Right-to-Work” law and voted to raise the minimum wage from $7.85 to $12.00 with HUGE statewide margins.
**2020 —** Voters approved Medicaid expansion in Missouri.
**2022 —** Missouri voters legalized recreational weed.
Missourians have broken with Josh Hawley on all these issues over the last three election cycles because they’re tired of corrupt politicians like him getting in the way and trying to control their lives.
That means our campaign to replace Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate isn’t just about making a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**But we need your help to do it, Peter.** GOP mega-donors are already dumping money into our race hoping it’ll slow down our record-breaking grassroots movement. They even put over $1 MILLION into a Super PAC to attack Lucas early in this race. So now we have to ask:
**[If you’re ready to help Missourians take back their power one more time by defeating Josh Hawley and protecting abortion access in 2024, will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35679?refcode=em20230820-3596&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3596%2E614464%2E3bZvT-)**

name: Marc Elias (via DLCC.org)
subject: Republicans have written the rules in their favor for far too long...
body:
Building Democratic power in statehouses nationwide is the best way to fight back against Republicans’ voter suppression efforts and anti-democratic schemes. | | |
---
| | Hi, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the top attorneys in the fight to defend our democracy against Republicans’ far-right agenda. The fight for our democracy is an ongoing battle, and state legislatures are our last line of defense. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, on behalf of my friends at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, to ask you to [donate $7 to elect Democrats to state legislatures who will stand up to Republicans’ anti-democratic attacks. Can I count on your support today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7xYl1nBSu9Is2oiL4sorpKbe7sNv2qm0xB4aFmCZfJh80gCDa-83tiXdx2BZsFH52yRPrKx2FC2vdqlAzbaVd2vz-Eim679TAT938k4yCKlAREVpYEtdt3s2OK8w8gXNiALJPwltlk4x8vu0JrVD6DckTvz9zKCtpgLzEHe7EAPFzA7fwodqw2wHr9PV8AW6s243dLony4ppvo5v6msaJvU9xr63906kLm4gFLdePEi8x3wiSvNL0YsJ0PpBt_LW1APabX1OhLscGJq_me-zg3NU9yqd4jw_ebAuD2fXaN41ykLZce4pvgUpcOUGoGpU5DQMuMnV2dbX4Tf-c2f5OXvyRZb4w1kb__NxEjCJojMebXsKi5sR4V94lQPg2OV4HMqoahLbdn_tLfSqIES6SgSDe9voed1wK_dE8P85MisUo5AmWQ12fLMx_gStlB0s/3yw/gCwe760ER1SZ-ZdSWKX1WQ/h0/VukLiSh1HglIkrRF4YudQqvErk7vZX4nfBsLVOz1u7o) **[DONATE $7 »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7xYl1nBSu9Is2oiL4sorpKbe7sNv2qm0xB4aFmCZfJh80gCDa-83tiXdx2BZsFH52yRPrKx2FC2vdqlAzbaVd2vz-Eim679TAT938k4yCKlAREVpYEtdt3s2OK8w8gXNiALJPwltlk4x8vu0JrVD6DckTvz9zKCtpgLzEHe7EAAuBOUMUqYj-46f2oC1MsU_5E0rImIrr5v2GD_NhgmiloMToxQ1gf30KqBq4h5LZMMT8_NmvDEo4xqaNOfTEXyke7HBDKCgf9fSiBNNb6mhBevhoEZuVXHTjEPRjYguAxq6rx8wBwM34qZ5eOT0sGfET65H8Ke_Apn5mt_YDAJybklLSUyEvv-A50A4kvaIHYRqyDQB8JQljQCiTz73f5rB2izBFtaIFxt4wQj239CcB81vMMqVEMXouhFAjIxuwv_-wujqyrtTJX3S9pLA3LAE/3yw/gCwe760ER1SZ-ZdSWKX1WQ/h1/SQ1IRqB8Tq3uqUsk3uNDuKVT85P-X7bfyp5ooupQ-K8)** Republicans have written the rules in their favor for far too long, drawing maps that encourage extreme partisan gerrymandering and building barriers to the ballot box to preserve their majorities. Electing Democrats to our state legislatures is critical to stopping them:
* In Wisconsin, Republicans have used their power in the legislature to rig the maps. Earlier this month, voters filed a petition in the WI Supreme Court challenging the state’s partisan maps. With a new liberal majority on the court,**Democrats could secure fair maps and finally build power.**
* In North Carolina, Republicans are using their veto-proof supermajority to pass extreme voter suppression bills – creating stricter requirements for mail-in ballots and adding administrative burden for election officials. **But flipping just _one_ GOP-held seat would break their supermajority.**

We have the opportunity to defeat Republicans’ decades-long advantage in states like Wisconsin and North Carolina. By electing Democrats in these states and beyond, we can stand up to the GOP’s right-wing, anti-democratic agenda. This is no small task – it’ll take time, funding, coordination, and grassroots support through and beyond Election Day. That’s why I’m counting on you to step up and own a piece of this fight. clean_body: Building Democratic power in statehouses nationwide is the best way to fight back against Republicans’ voter suppression efforts and anti-democratic schemes. | | | | | Hi, it’s Marc Elias. I’m proud to be one of the top attorneys in the fight to defend our democracy against Republicans’ far-right agenda. The fight for our democracy is an ongoing battle, and state legislatures are our last line of defense. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, on behalf of my friends at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, to ask you to Republicans have written the rules in their favor for far too long, drawing maps that encourage extreme partisan gerrymandering and building barriers to the ballot box to preserve their majorities. Electing Democrats to our state legislatures is critical to stopping them: In Wisconsin, Republicans have used their power in the legislature to rig the maps. Earlier this month, voters filed a petition in the WI Supreme Court challenging the state’s partisan maps. With a new liberal majority on the court,Democrats could secure fair maps and finally build power. In North Carolina, Republicans are using their veto-proof supermajority to pass extreme voter suppression bills – creating stricter requirements for mail-in ballots and adding administrative burden for election officials. But flipping just one GOP-held seat would break their supermajority. We have the opportunity to defeat Republicans’ decades-long advantage in states like Wisconsin and North Carolina. By electing Democrats in these states and beyond, we can stand up to the GOP’s right-wing, anti-democratic agenda. This is no small task – it’ll take time, funding, coordination, and grassroots support through and beyond Election Day. That’s why I’m counting on you to step up and own a piece of this fight. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Together, Marc Elias | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
In a post-Roe v. Wade country, reelecting Yadira Caraveo to Congress is more important than ever.

| Peter, Yadira Caraveo is one of the strongest pro-choice advocates in the House.

She’s been a champion for reproductive freedom – and in post-_Roe v. Wade_ America, reelecting her to Congress is more important than ever. _That’s why we’re reaching out today._

clean_body: In a post-Roe v. Wade country, reelecting Yadira Caraveo to Congress is more important than ever. | Peter, Yadira Caraveo is one of the strongest pro-choice advocates in the House. She’s been a champion for reproductive freedom – and in post-Roe v. Wade America, reelecting her to Congress is more important than ever. That’s why we’re reaching out today. EMILYs List is proud to support Yadira Caraveo, because we know we can count on her to do her part in protecting reproductive freedom for her district in Colorado. = | **= Peter, at EMILYs List, we work to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot and across the country with a goal of fighting for our rights and our communities. Your support helps us recruit and train candidates just like Yadira Caraveo. And with MAGA Republicans doing everything they can to roll back reproductive freedom, it’s critical that we work harder than ever to reelect pro-choice candidates and flip the House in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Yadira Caraveo and EMILYs List and go through immediately: | ******=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=******** Thank you for being with us in the fight, \- the EMILYs List team | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Strengthening Data Security
body:
Go to alfonsoforcongress.com to learn more! | | | | |
---
|
---
# Strengthening
# Data Security
|
---
In our tech-driven lives, robust data security is now more critical than ever.
Between 2005 and 2020, Michigan lost 11 million records in data breaches, highlighting the urgent need for comprehensive solutions.
I am dedicated to ensuring the safety and privacy of every individual in our great state.
As technology continues to shape our world, we must hold tech companies accountable for safeguarding our personal information.
Our goal is simple: enact regulations to prevent data breaches and protect seniors, military, and minors from data manipulation.
| [LEARN MORE](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=8861a5254e&e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
# Championing
# Data Security
|
---
Our mission to enhance data security requires collective effort.
Supporting our campaign makes you a vital part of safeguarding every Michigan resident's privacy and well-being.
Your contribution goes beyond financial support; it's a vote of confidence in our commitment to make a difference.
Together, we will drive meaningful change by strengthening regulations and advocating for robust cybersecurity measures.
Every donation, no matter the amount, takes us one step closer to ensuring a safer digital landscape for all.
|
---
# EVERY DOLLAR
# COUNTS!
|
---
| [GIVE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=e47bca13e3&e=16d812e81c)
---
Thank you for your dedication to the betterment of our community.
Your interest and support are the driving force behind our mission to safeguard Michigan's data and protect the vulnerable.
Let's work together to create a more secure future.
Visit alfonsoforcongress.com and click "Give Today" to contribute securely.
Every donation, big or small, makes a difference.
Thank you for believing in our cause.
Together, we'll build a Michigan that works for everyone, reflecting the spirit of democracy.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Alfonso For Congress Team
| | | | [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=e05f86b24b&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=7343396589&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=345b7f8348&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=39eeafdc77&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=f6e1149b2f&e=16d812e81c)

**Whether it's expanding Medicaid, defending reproductive freedom, raising the minimum wage, or providing guaranteed paid family and medical leave, voters in red and purple states are taking matters in their own hands and passing ballot measures that will benefit their lives.** _Now, out-of-touch politicians are getting tired of losing and are starting to play dirty._
We've seen that just this month with Ohio's Issue 1 where state legislators are actively trying to create a barrier to entry for citizen-sponsored ballot measures. **They don't want a fair fight,** and it's up to us to keep fighting back against attacks to direct democracy.
**Let's stand united against those who seek to silence our democracy.[Rush a donation today so we can continue beating back attacks to ballot measures.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68378269/422875921/-1644345685?&refcode=E3772-20230819-DemocracyinCrisis-SL-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjMzZTZkNi03YTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SoPgOJONNb1tVS6LTMf0hUM0twJYdWJ6Ve3fVks9q2U=)**

clean_body: | | Friend, We're not being dramatic when we say that our democracy is in a crisis if our opponents get the best of us. Extremist politicians are working overtime to try to not only stop progressive campaigns at the ballot box...but also to eliminate them from getting there in the first place. But we won't let that happen. Here at Fairness Project, we believe change is possible when people unite to fight for what is right. Through advocacy and community empowerment, we are leading the charge against these coordinated efforts to silence voters at the ballot box. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Whether it's expanding Medicaid, defending reproductive freedom, raising the minimum wage, or providing guaranteed paid family and medical leave, voters in red and purple states are taking matters in their own hands and passing ballot measures that will benefit their lives. Now, out-of-touch politicians are getting tired of losing and are starting to play dirty. We've seen that just this month with Ohio's Issue 1 where state legislators are actively trying to create a barrier to entry for citizen-sponsored ballot measures. They don't want a fair fight, and it's up to us to keep fighting back against attacks to direct democracy. Let's stand united against those who seek to silence our democracy.= = Thanks for standing with us, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats and public records
body:
Happy Sunday from the team at Shift WA, working since 2013 to shift the political debate in Washington state. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62160358:W4adaqDfN:m:1:2610672541:43B5C8A2ADC5079ACE525F43216EB1C3:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, Happy Sunday from the team at Shift WA, working since 2013 to shift the political debate in Washington state. We've spent the last decade providing people like you with the facts and perspective needed to make a difference in your community. So, as always, we hope to help keep you up to date with an item or two of interest from your own backyard. Read on... ** ** **This week 's need-to-know story...** State Senate Majority Leader Andy Billig recently assured the public that his fellow Democrats were no longer hiding public records, but a recent report by Crosscut reveals that's just not the case. According to Crosscut, the "Washington state Senate has released a new batch of lawmaker emails and text messages that had been redacted using a legally unproven exemption designed to shield government information from the public." This latest release of long-hidden records contradicts Sen. Billig's earlier statements and raises concerns about the Democrat-controlled legislature's handling of its obligation to disclose information under Washington's Public Records Act. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62160359:W4adaqDfN:m:1:2610672541:43B5C8A2ADC5079ACE525F43216EB1C3:r). **This week 's top story...** The Spokane mayoral race is a competitive contest between incumbent Mayor Nadine Woodward and challenger Lisa Brown in a classic conservative vs. liberal showdown. Democrats aim to win the top office in Spokane after a decade of being unsuccessful. One of the key issues dividing the candidates is the growth of the City Council office's budget and staff over the last two decades - particularly during Woodward's term. Mayor Woodward is citing the budget growth as evidence that the City Council is attempting to overreach and grab power. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62160360:W4adaqDfN:m:1:2610672541:43B5C8A2ADC5079ACE525F43216EB1C3:r). **In case you missed it ...**
Everyone knows Governor Jay Inslee's cap-and-tax law, passed during the 2021 COVID-lockdown legislative session, is complex. Now it appears Gov. Inslee is hoping to exploit that complexity to evade accountability for rising gas prices. But doubts about this strategy are emerging. Even the Seattle Times highlighted an expert's criticism of the law's premise, questioning the logic of placing a disproportionate financial burden on one state's consumers to reduce emissions. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62160361:W4adaqDfN:m:1:2610672541:43B5C8A2ADC5079ACE525F43216EB1C3:r). **This week 's bit of inspiration...** Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful photography of Nehalem Beach in Oregon at sunset, courtesy of former U.S. Representative Rod Chandler. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62160362:W4adaqDfN:m:1:2610672541:43B5C8A2ADC5079ACE525F43216EB1C3:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14274455&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW4adaqDfN).
---

Here’s what we can do about it >>

Peter,
Recent analysis from POLITICO found that small-dollar political donations are down across the board. Democratic campaigns at every level, from local to presidential, are feeling the slump.
This may sound like bad news, but where some see a challenge, this team sees an opportunity.

body:
Hi Peter, my name is Yadira Caraveo. I am the representative from Colorado's 8th Congressional District and a proud EMILYs List candidate. I wanted to share a little bit about my story, and why I'm in this fight. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68379879/422880968/-359072743?refcode=20230820_HHYC&refcode2=WTEFC850&sourceid=1051744&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDlkNGY4OC03YzNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oyE6K8gMcczR5fEzaoh54yivNooKQ4AVySIdhlAyx4=) Hi Peter, my name is Yadira Caraveo. I am the representative from Colorado's 8th Congressional District and a proud EMILYs List candidate. I wanted to share a little bit about my story, and why I'm in this fight. **[I hope you'll take a moment to read this message, but if you're already with me, will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68379880/422880969/-359072743?refcode=20230820_HHYC&refcode2=WTEFC850&sourceid=1051744&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDlkNGY4OC03YzNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oyE6K8gMcczR5fEzaoh54yivNooKQ4AVySIdhlAyx4=)** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68379881/422880970/-359072743?refcode=20230820_HHYC&refcode2=WTEFC850&sourceid=1051744&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDlkNGY4OC03YzNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oyE6K8gMcczR5fEzaoh54yivNooKQ4AVySIdhlAyx4=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68379882/422880971/-359072743?refcode=20230820_HHYC&refcode2=WTEFC850&sourceid=1051744&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDlkNGY4OC03YzNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oyE6K8gMcczR5fEzaoh54yivNooKQ4AVySIdhlAyx4=)
---
**Family means everything to me.** My parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, looking for a better life. They knew that hard work and caring for others are the values that build strong communities and families. They raised me and my siblings with those values — on a construction worker's pay in the Adams County home they still live in.

**I put myself through undergrad and medical school, becoming the first person in my family to graduate from college.** I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community — to the folks that raised me. **But I quickly understood that truly helping children required a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor.**

That's why I ran for the state legislature, and, Peter, that's why I ran for Congress in 2022. The pollsters said I had a 4% shot of winning this race. **No one thought that a first-generation Latina from Adams County would beat the odds and make history — but we did, and it's because of grassroots Democrats like you that I have the privilege of representing my community in Congress.**

I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect the right to choose.
[_**I'm ready to continue advocating for Coloradans in Congress, but I need your support to do it. So please, will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List to help elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68379883/422880972/-359072743?refcode=20230820_HHYC&refcode2=WTEFC850&sourceid=1051744&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDlkNGY4OC03YzNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oyE6K8gMcczR5fEzaoh54yivNooKQ4AVySIdhlAyx4=)
_If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately._

clean_body: Hi Peter, my name is Yadira Caraveo. I am the representative from Colorado's 8th Congressional District and a proud EMILYs List candidate. I wanted to share a little bit about my story, and why I'm in this fight. | | | = Hi Peter, my name is Yadira Caraveo. I am the representative from Colorado's 8th Congressional District and a proud EMILYs List candidate. I wanted to share a little bit about my story, and why I'm in this fight. = = | = Family means everything to me. My parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, looking for a better life. They knew that hard work and caring for others are the values that build strong communities and families. They raised me and my siblings with those values — on a construction worker's pay in the Adams County home they still live in. I put myself through undergrad and medical school, becoming the first person in my family to graduate from college. I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community — to the folks that raised me. But I quickly understood that truly helping children required a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor. That's why I ran for the state legislature, and, Peter, that's why I ran for Congress in 2022. The pollsters said I had a 4% shot of winning this race. No one thought that a first-generation Latina from Adams County would beat the odds and make history — but we did, and it's because of grassroots Democrats like you that I have the privilege of representing my community in Congress. I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect the right to choose. = If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being a part of my story. \- Yadira Rep. Yadira Caraveo = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: How do you like your corn dog?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friend, I have one question for you today, _ketchup or mustard?_ If you don’t know what I’m talking about, please give me a moment to explain: Every year during the Illinois State Fair, the age-old debate of whether ketchup or mustard is the better condiment to top onto the fair’s famous corn dogs resurfaces. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380219/422882282/-2053028736?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230820_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWZkNjc1Mi03ZjNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8jufecEzKDvpiXKhFndsG-2yoaDHK2GM9t5UIOcjU4=) Friend, if you can’t tell from the photo above, I’m _clearly_ team mustard. And while the State Fair is a great place to indulge in our favorite summertime snacks, it’s also one of our longest, most popular ongoing traditions, highlighting our agricultural industry and the hard work of Illinois farmers. We all might not agree on how we like to eat our corn dogs, but I think it’s safe to say that we all believe our farmers are crucial to our district — and as the people who keep our communities running, they should be supported and protected. That’s why I’m working to find common ground with my colleagues to pass legislation like the 2023 Farm Bill to benefit farmers, bring more people into the agricultural workforce, and keep rural economies strong. **[Even if you’re a ketchup person, I hope we can commit to making progress for farmers across IL-13 and our entire country. name: Katie Porter
subject: The gap between politicians’ promises and what actually happens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Good government oversight makes a real difference in people’s lives.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28502%2E3422442%2EIXSJJG)
Oversight: it’s an often overlooked responsibility of Congress, but it’s Congress’ job to oversee how taxpayer dollars are spent, how government programs are run, and even hold corporations accountable when they harm or cheat consumers.
That work often gets ignored.
**Good government oversight makes a real difference in people’s lives.** Take the Inflation Reduction Act for example. It included tax credits for households that switched to more energy efficient appliances. But a year later those tax credits still aren’t available—which is why I’m pushing leaders of both parties and doing what I can to get these credits enacted and make sure people actually know about them.
[**As a former consumer protection attorney, I’m passionate about getting oversight right. Can you pitch in $20 today to send me to the U.S. Senate to do this important work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230820-1?amount=20refcode=EMAK20_1_OVR_20230820_V1_F&refcode2=28502_3422442_IXSJJG&akid=28502%2E3422442%2EIXSJJG)

clean_body: Good government oversight makes a real difference in people’s lives. Oversight: it’s an often overlooked responsibility of Congress, but it’s Congress’ job to oversee how taxpayer dollars are spent, how government programs are run, and even hold corporations accountable when they harm or cheat consumers. That work often gets ignored. Good government oversight makes a real difference in people’s lives. Take the Inflation Reduction Act for example. It included tax credits for households that switched to more energy efficient appliances. But a year later those tax credits still aren’t available—which is why I’m pushing leaders of both parties and doing what I can to get these credits enacted and make sure people actually know about them. Thank you! —Katie Porter (proud driver of a minivan whose license plate says ‘OVRSITE’) Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: back to school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I’ve seen firsthand just how committed public school teachers are to our kids.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380493/422883084/823540626?refcode=ea.ca3d4302-813f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.ca3d4302-813f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTNkNDMwMi04MTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-gn5eckXZtOrIsCk086n6QVJUXrL0fXe0ItC82Qi5g=&emci=86634c65-f73d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ca3d4302-813f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Right now, while families across the state are getting ready to send their kids back to school, teachers are working on setting up their classrooms.

All too often, those teachers have to reach into their own pockets to provide the supplies their students need — even though teachers need a raise themselves.

**But Republican legislators have made it clear: They DON’T see public education as a priority.** And if we leave it up to the GOP, we’ll see schools defunded in favor of unaccountable private schools and teachers won’t get the salary increases they deserve.

**[To save North Carolina’s public education system, we have to break the GOP’s one-vote supermajorities in Raleigh and elect leaders who will work FOR public schools and teachers. Please donate whatever you can to help>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380494/422883085/435245919?refcode=ea.ca3d4302-813f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.ca3d4302-813f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTNkNDMwMi04MTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-gn5eckXZtOrIsCk086n6QVJUXrL0fXe0ItC82Qi5g=)**

Peter, this is a deeply personal issue to me: My mother was one of the best North Carolina public school teachers around. I received an excellent education in North Carolina public schools as did all three of my children.

But our students can’t receive the quality of education they deserve if their schools don’t have sufficient resources and their teachers are burnt out with second or third jobs to make ends meet.

Republican leaders have abandoned any pretense of supporting teachers, students, and public schools in this budget process. Thankfully, there are Democratic candidates all across the state who will prioritize the public education system — and it’s up to _us_ to help elect them.

**[I’m counting on your help, Peter! clean_body: I’ve seen firsthand just how committed public school teachers are to our kids. | Right now, while families across the state are getting ready to send their kids back to school, teachers are working on setting up their classrooms. All too often, those teachers have to reach into their own pockets to provide the supplies their students need — even though teachers need a raise themselves. But Republican legislators have made it clear: They DON’T see public education as a priority. And if we leave it up to the GOP, we’ll see schools defunded in favor of unaccountable private schools and teachers won’t get the salary increases they deserve. = Peter, this is a deeply personal issue to me: My mother was one of the best North Carolina public school teachers around. I received an excellent education in North Carolina public schools as did all three of my children. But our students can’t receive the quality of education they deserve if their schools don’t have sufficient resources and their teachers are burnt out with second or third jobs to make ends meet. Republican leaders have abandoned any pretense of supporting teachers, students, and public schools in this budget process. Thankfully, there are Democratic candidates all across the state who will prioritize the public education system — and it’s up to us to help elect them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Hey team – it’s Natalie, Andrea’s campaign manager. I’ll keep this quick.

Every Monday, I have a finance check-in with Andrea to update her on our fundraising progress and our ability to invest in critical voter outreach programs.

Well, I just ran the numbers ahead of tomorrow’s meeting ... and things aren’t looking good.

I really don’t want to deliver bad news to Andrea or entertain budget cuts, but if things don’t improve in the next 24 hours, I won’t have a choice.

[**That’s why I’m coming to you. With our race really heating up, we can’t afford to scale back our campaign, so please: Can I count on you to make a grassroots donation of any size? name: Team Greta
subject: Exceptions? Not even for a 13-year-old girl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
A 13-year-old forced to give birth in Mississippi shows the grim consequences of the Dobbs decision

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380581/422883390/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230820MSNBC_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwMDhhZjItODIzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lQnys8hmslas-mcOipku-5VkkesujWwlPyE-aOQY7Mw=) Peter,

Did you see Greta’s interview with Katie Phang on MSNBC yesterday? Greta highlighted how stories like that of a 13-year-old Clarksdale girl who was forced to give birth after being raped are becoming more and more common in a post-_Roe_ world. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380582/422883391/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230820MSNBC_G&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwMDhhZjItODIzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lQnys8hmslas-mcOipku-5VkkesujWwlPyE-aOQY7Mw=) There are exceptions for rape in Mississippi’s restrictive abortion laws, but as this case demonstrates, those exceptions are narrowly interpreted and seldom granted. AND even when exceptions are allowed, doctors fear criminalization for providing care and procedures can require costly out-of-state trips for patients.

**_This new grim reality is all thanks to Greta’s opponent._**

Mississippi’s current Attorney General led the charge to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and has created devastating consequences for reproductive healthcare access nationwide. Even with stories like the 13-year-old girl in Clarksdale becoming more frequent across the country, our AG is tripling down on efforts to restrict access to even basic birth control methods.

People are suffering, and in some cases even dying, without access to the full spectrum of reproductive healthcare they need and deserve. That’s why we need to elect Greta as Mississippi’s next Attorney General to stop the onslaught of attacks that continue on reproductive freedom even today, no matter what part of the country you live in.

[Greta has always advocated for reproductive freedom and was just endorsed by Planned Parenthood Southeast Advocates for her dedication to fighting attacks on our care. Will you help support reproductive rights and access to the full spectrum of healthcare women and families need by chipping in $25, $50, or whatever you can to Greta’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380583/422883392/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230820MSNBC_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwMDhhZjItODIzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lQnys8hmslas-mcOipku-5VkkesujWwlPyE-aOQY7Mw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380584/422883393/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230820MSNBC_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEwMDhhZjItODIzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lQnys8hmslas-mcOipku-5VkkesujWwlPyE-aOQY7Mw=)**

subject: I introduced the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
As a gay man, this means so much to me.

| **Peter — In June, I proudly reintroduced the Equality Act,** a hugely important set of reforms that would finally prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex, sexual orientation and gender identity.

****[**Peter, as a member of the LGBTQ+ community, nothing would mean more to me than your support of this critical legislation. Will you take just a few seconds to cosponsor the Equality Act and join the fight to protect gay marriage? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380593/422883403/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20230820_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAxOGFmMi04MjNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nJYnIDNRXZ67iaxhalKojW0euevHOEb_McychG_q00=&emci=082b3588-063e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=04018af2-823f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)**** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380594/422883404/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20230820_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAxOGFmMi04MjNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nJYnIDNRXZ67iaxhalKojW0euevHOEb_McychG_q00=&emci=082b3588-063e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=04018af2-823f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602) | [5,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: COSPONSOR THE EQUALITY ACT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380595/422883405/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20230820_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAxOGFmMi04MjNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nJYnIDNRXZ67iaxhalKojW0euevHOEb_McychG_q00=&emci=082b3588-063e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=04018af2-823f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)

Peter, as a gay man, I was publicly outed against my will by my Republican opponent when I ran for Congress in 1994.

I get constant homophobic hate for my support of LGBTQ+ communities.

I grew up in an America that denied me the right to marry.

**And I’m not going back.** That’s why I introduced the Equality Act to Congress.

But Republicans are dead set on seeing this bill FAIL! So, along with my reintroduction of the Equality Act, _**I need a groundswell of support from folks like you to prove to Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue.**_

[**Peter, take 5 seconds to cosponsor the Equality Act NOW! We have to strike while the iron is hot – I’m counting on 5,000 signatures before 10AM tomorrow »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68380596/422883406/508280115?refcode=MTFC_20230820_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDAxOGFmMi04MjNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nJYnIDNRXZ67iaxhalKojW0euevHOEb_McychG_q00=&emci=082b3588-063e-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=04018af2-823f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=18839602)

www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: As a gay man, this means so much to me. | Peter — In June, I proudly reintroduced the Equality Act, a hugely important set of reforms that would finally prohibit discrimination on the basis of sex, sexual orientation and gender identity. ** | Peter, as a gay man, I was publicly outed against my will by my Republican opponent when I ran for Congress in 1994. I get constant homophobic hate for my support of LGBTQ+ communities. I grew up in an America that denied me the right to marry. And I’m not going back. That’s why I introduced the Equality Act to Congress. But Republicans are dead set on seeing this bill FAIL! So, along with my reintroduction of the Equality Act, I need a groundswell of support from folks like you to prove to Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue. Thank you, Peter, I can’t do this without you. — Mark Congressman, California's 39th District | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. Chuck Grassley | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Team \-- you won't believe the lengths some folks will go to when they're afraid of the power of the people. We just had a front-row seat to the circus in Ohio, and let me tell you, it's a show that's both infuriating and yet inspiring.
[**Here are the cold, hard takeaways that speak volumes about the state of our democracy:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68380949/422884656/1293220121?refcode=20230818_AOTL_F_BizOhio_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU0YjYwLTgzM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OfJgFIEMZ4cHp6CrL-ir9bH2PzW0In6RCm5B_Ot8drA=)
[**🗳️ Voter Turnout Triumph:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68380950/422884657/1293220121?refcode=20230818_AOTL_F_BizOhio_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU0YjYwLTgzM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OfJgFIEMZ4cHp6CrL-ir9bH2PzW0In6RCm5B_Ot8drA=) Despite the odds stacked against Ohio voters, they stood up to extreme lawmakers dirty tricks and showed up at the polls. Their voices echoed loud and clear, refusing to be stifled by their shady tactics. [**🏛️ Democracy Champions:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68380951/422884658/1293220121?refcode=20230818_AOTL_F_BizOhio_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU0YjYwLTgzM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OfJgFIEMZ4cHp6CrL-ir9bH2PzW0In6RCm5B_Ot8drA=) From the 2022 midterms to Wisconsin's spring election and now Ohio's August showdown, one thing's clear: when democracy's at stake, we're not sitting on the sidelines. We're here and ready to make a stand. [**📢 People Power Prevails:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68380952/422884659/1293220121?refcode=20230818_AOTL_F_BizOhio_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU0YjYwLTgzM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OfJgFIEMZ4cHp6CrL-ir9bH2PzW0In6RCm5B_Ot8drA=) In the face of adversity, we proved that extremist anti-democratic tricks and tactics can't stand a chance against the strength of our united movement. They threw everything at us, but we emerged victorious because we know our cause is just. [**🔗 Keep The Momentum:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68380953/422884660/1293220121?refcode=20230818_AOTL_F_BizOhio_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU0YjYwLTgzM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OfJgFIEMZ4cHp6CrL-ir9bH2PzW0In6RCm5B_Ot8drA=) This battle isn't over. If anything, this is a reminder that our fight for fair maps and true representation is far from over. The opposition may have underestimated us, but let's keep showing them the power of grassroots action and unshakeable determination. **[Make a donation to All On The Line today.>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68380954/422884661/1293220121?refcode=20230818_AOTL_F_BizOhio_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU0YjYwLTgzM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OfJgFIEMZ4cHp6CrL-ir9bH2PzW0In6RCm5B_Ot8drA=)** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68380955/422884662/1293220121?refcode=20230818_AOTL_F_BizOhio_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxYzU0YjYwLTgzM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OfJgFIEMZ4cHp6CrL-ir9bH2PzW0In6RCm5B_Ot8drA=)

clean_body: | Team \-- you won't believe the lengths some folks will go to when they're afraid of the power of the people. We just had a front-row seat to the circus in Ohio, and let me tell you, it's a show that's both infuriating and yet inspiring. = = Despite the odds stacked against Ohio voters, they stood up to extreme lawmakers dirty tricks and showed up at the polls. Their voices echoed loud and clear, refusing to be stifled by their shady tactics. = From the 2022 midterms to Wisconsin's spring election and now Ohio's August showdown, one thing's clear: when democracy's at stake, we're not sitting on the sidelines. We're here and ready to make a stand. = In the face of adversity, we proved that extremist anti-democratic tricks and tactics can't stand a chance against the strength of our united movement. They threw everything at us, but we emerged victorious because we know our cause is just. = This battle isn't over. If anything, this is a reminder that our fight for fair maps and true representation is far from over. The opposition may have underestimated us, but let's keep showing them the power of grassroots action and unshakeable determination. = | = = We won't let their antics deter us. So, let's channel our energy, our passion, and our grit to keep pushing forward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = = We keep pushing, keep organizing, and keep proving that democracy isn't just a buzzword -- it's a living, breathing force driven by everyday folks like you and me. Stay resilient, stay engaged, and let's keep showing the world that democracy isn't negotiable. \-- John Bisognano President All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Friend,
In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can pitch in to support Seth Moulton and my campaign for U.S. Senate [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff] ahead of our fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?
Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.
As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.
McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.
It’s clear that McCarthy and his right-wing allies are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit our fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.
Pitch in now -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Investing now and building the campaign infrastructure to break through the Republicans’ noise and reach voters across California is going to be the key to success in this race. Thanks for anything you can contribute to help.
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

Peter, this headline just told our team everything we need to know: **Moms for Liberty plans Milwaukee events ahead of GOP debate**
_— Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ Moms for Liberty is a fringe, far-right group known for leading the charge on dystopian book bans and fighting against education about race and LGBTQ+ identities in schools. **Now, they’re bringing their hate and bigotry to Wisconsin in preparation for Wednesday’s GOP debate.** **[Rush in a donation to help us fight back, reelect Tammy, and stand up for LGBTQ+ rights that fringe groups like Moms for Liberty are trying to roll back.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230820_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=994%2E35263%2E_k3ycQ)** | [DONATE NOW →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230820_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=994%2E35263%2E_k3ycQ)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: God’s children are not for sale – download the guide today
body:
| | |
---
Like many of you, I saw [_The Sound of Freedom_](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and was horrified, disgusted, and heartbroken. For those of you who haven’t seen it, I encourage you to do so, but even without having seen it, I’m sure you are aware of the scourge of child sex trafficking. I was also angry after watching the film. So angry. I was angry because you and I have called for our elected officials to secure our border, enforce our immigration laws, and crack down on the cartels and traffickers for **_YEARS_**. And yet, most of them did nothing. In fact, it’s worse than doing nothing. Some of them, like Joe Biden (and the people who tell him what to do), deliberately make the border situation worse. Think of how many children could have been saved from abuse and torture if elected officials, years ago, simply did the job they swore an oath to do. I was also angry because our education system has been conquered by left-wing activists pushing radical gender ideology and “comprehensive sex education” in our schools. The curriculum they teach and the tactics they use to indoctrinate children are eerily similar to those used by pedophiles and traffickers. It is quite literally grooming our kids and making the trafficker’s job easier.
---
| | **So, what can you do about it?** There are actions that most of us just can’t do – like storming a trafficking compound in South America – but there are things you and I _can_ do to help stop this abominable and evil practice.
---
| [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | **That’s why we created our newest how-to guide:** [**God’s Children Are Not for Sale.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-oyJTDApXYJVznE-zQ)**** Simply enter your email address and you can download the guide for free. We’ve included tools and resources for you to pressure your elected officials on the issue of border security and the grooming going on in public school, and to help you educate others in your community about how child sex trafficking is related to the border and education. Please download it, use it, and share it with your network and on social media. I am so grateful for Tim Ballard, Operation Underground Railroad (OUR) and Angel Studios for producing _The Sound of Freedom._ I encourage you to donate to OUR [here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._q0yUHA09M8aQLTw) and Angel Studios [here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). Peter,
_This will only take a moment of your time._
The **National Republican Senatorial Committee** asked me to reach out to you about an URGENT matter:
**There are several potential Republican Presidential nominees**
**who could serve as our President in 2024. We need to know**

body:
When I ran for commissioner of public lands in 2016, I was asked how a “little lady” like me was going to manage 6 million acres of land and a $500 million budget.

| Peter,

When I ran for commissioner of public lands in 2016, I was asked how a “little lady” like me was going to manage 6 million acres of land and a $500 million budget.

No one thought I could win. I was told to start from the ground up and wait my turn. But I knew I had the vision, values, passion, and determination to take Washington further.

**Together we broke barriers electing me as only the second woman elected as commissioner of public lands.** _Now, I'm running for governor to continue delivering meaningful change that will last for generations to come._ [_**In these early moments of our campaign, every dollar makes a huge difference. We’re falling behind our end-of-month goal. It’s now or never. | | PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING

name: Team Liz
subject: ensuring fairness for our NY-17 seniors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY
body:
Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/MYVOZ4KcDEWY9i98RJm9xg2?unsubscribedata=SduMGZlIQG3Vd%2BZidSa33zgGn2i9bA2bTVTK5n0lT5LfNAekgm%2BkBnazFj8HD2LvVl%2F%2F5YHaRej6H74xSLpbMd%2FS9l8yubkKBkJMg2rqCVwepnHtq%2FocvZZjNcNYJZ0eCpqY7QXS0pERtohUcGtukFYQDw%2FOo9qgHTUZONeeQ2VUHeHog%2B%2FfO8hlZ8gJj8AGPyx02QfNyCOe23jRVOeFG2d6yhwngebChQYESM%2BML9CYNUVSwz3045fQv9ZgKqSM6jS4%2FBdoT2TMkms%2B85UcL4vofaf0zZxSbi%2F0vHlaLkJ7LNHkCj3CSKHQhVg0p%2BMXz5i%2F%2BtaDUk%2BMRW3GOvHczS3dZEqky%2BRb%2B7UJCHZY2OYR1T2sx4B5hiyS5CsEz3Rh2OZ3jMT%2FQvL%2BcCTVtelkCiT5HVWFcJILHYMEf94YKG7UM91lulgw6Qr9rdIv5x8t)
---
| |
---
Peter,

One of the main reasons Liz is running for Congress is to fight for affordability for all Hudson Valley residents – **_including seniors across the district._**

[While New York’s insulin cap at $35/month was a great start, there is still more work to be done in ensuring fairness for our seniors. name: Gabrielle Fink
subject: Hey Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I’m the team’s online fundraiser, which means I’m constantly refreshing our contribution pages to keep track of how much we raise from emails like this.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)
Hey Peter! It’s Gaby, Bob’s digital director.
I’m the team’s online fundraiser, which means I’m constantly asking folks to **[chip in a few dollars to our campaign](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230820-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230820-1&refcode2=472_552475_w1nwwM&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)** , and refreshing our contribution pages to keep track of how much we raise from emails like this. I also look at stats like what percentage of folks regularly engage with our content, how many new grassroots donors are joining our team, and what our average donation is.
That brings me to my next point. I was crunching some numbers this morning, and wanted to share that **last week, our average online donation was $27.29!** This is particularly exciting to me, because it goes to show that we’re building our campaign brick by brick, dollar by dollar, one supporter at a time.
Grassroots donations really do make a difference, and when our supporters come together and chip in what they can -- be it $5, $10, or $27.29 at a time -- that’s how we build a campaign that is capable of taking on whatever folks like Mitch McConnell throw our way.
[**So what do you say, Peter? Will you chip in $27.29 or whatever you’re able right now to keep Bob Casey fighting for Pennsylvanians in the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230820-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230820-1&refcode2=472_552475_w1nwwM&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)
**[Chip In $27.29 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230820-1?refcode=em20230820-1&amount=27.29&refcode2=472_552475_w1nwwM&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)**
**[Chip In More ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230820-1?refcode=em20230820-1&refcode2=472_552475_w1nwwM&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)**
Thanks for being the best grassroots team out there!
Gabrielle Fink
Digital Director, Bob Casey for Senate
P.S. I wouldn’t be doing my job if I didn’t add in one more **[donation link](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230820-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230820-1&refcode2=472_552475_w1nwwM&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)** , and maybe a fun button too.
**[Donate If You ❤️ Maps ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230820-1?refcode=em20230820-1&refcode2=472_552475_w1nwwM&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=472%2E552475%2Ew1nwwM)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
