# Please Share With Your Fellow Patriots!
|
---
**JOE, HUNTER AND JAMES BIDEN CONVICTED OF FELONY CRIMES BEFORE CITIZENS COURT**
Sentencing to Occur Tuesday, August 29, 2023 At 12:00 P.M. Eastern | 9:00 A.M. Pacific

(Boise, Idaho, August 20, 2023) Thursday, the Citizens Prosecutor, Larry Klayman, the General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc., announced that a Citizens Judge, Michael Pendleton, has handed down the first felony convictions of Joe, Hunter and James Biden, with regard to various criminal charges that were returned by a Citizens Grand Jury on October 14, 2021. The felony charges and convictions of Joe Biden concern negligent homicide over his actions in Afghanistan that resulted in the deaths of 13 American servicemen and Afghan allies including their young children, his accepting of bribes, and the commission of other enumerated felonies with regard to a money laundering scheme to enrich Joe Biden and his family carried about by Hunter and James Biden. Hunter and James Biden were also convicted as part of this racketeering scheme.
Prior to the trial which led to their convictions, Joe, Hunter and James Biden were notified of their right to appear, plead guilty, not guilty or nolo contendere, as well as appear at trial to defend themselves, through counsel or pro se. Apparently, having no respect for the legal authority and rights of the America people, neither they nor their legal counsel appeared at any time, and thus they were tried in absentia. At the sentencing of the Bidens, scheduled for August 29, 2023, they will again be accorded a final opportunity to appear and defend themselves, but given their apparent contempt, arrogance and lawlessness toward the people of the United States, this is not likely.
The power and authority of the American people to enforce not just man’s law, but the law of nature and nature’s God, as enumerated in our Declaration of Independence, is sacrosanct. Indeed, a primary reason to declare independence on July 4, 1776, was triggered by King George III and the British monarchy, when they took away from the colonies our criminal justice system, which was sent back to his Court of St. James in London.
In the landmark Supreme Court case of Williams vs. United States, 504 U.S. 36 (1992), Justice Antonin Scalia, writing for the majority, ruled that the grand jury and thus the criminal process belongs to the American people and not exclusively to the three branches of government. Thus, this right exists side by side with establishment grand juries administered by the U.S. Justice Department.
Given the two tiered, selective prosecution, discriminatory, dishonest and totally corrupt current state of the U. S. Justice Department and its Federal Bureau of Investigation under the “leadership” of Attorney General Merrick Garland and FBI Director Christopher Wray, which under Joe Biden has been weaponized as a virtual “Gestapo” against all those who oppose him, the Democrats and the left, including but hardly limited to the peaceful January 6, 2021 protesters, it was incumbent of the American people themselves, particularly given the lack of courage, if not compromised cowardly Republicans and other government authorities, to hold the “Biden Crime Family” to account under the rule of law.
Larry Klayman, the Citizens Prosecutor, had this to say upon the issuance of the Bidens’ convictions which resulted from their trial in Boise, Idaho during the first week of July, 2022 and which continued thereafter. Go to [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=13ac7a2745&e=8edd2b8f7d) for video excerpts of the trial:
“No one but the American people themselves will hold the “Biden Crime Family” to account for their crimes. The executive branch, in particular, of our current government, is corrupt and Republicans simply put on dog and pony shows on Capitol Hill, as “Rome burns,” with President Trump being wrongly indicted four times by rabid leftist Democrat prosecutors, but the Bidens allowed to roam free. This will not stand, and Joe, Hunter and James Biden will be sentenced for their crimes against the people of the United States and then it will be incumbent for them to surrender themselves or, if as expected they do not, it will be necessary for established law enforcement or the military to take them into custody for them to serve time in prison.”

**The Bidens’ sentencing will occur and be available to view at**[**www.freedomwatchusa.org**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=ccb9367716&e=8edd2b8f7d)**on Zoom and YouTube at 12:00 P.M. Eastern | 10:00 A.M. Pacific Tuesday, August 29, 2023.**
**THE**[**CONVICTION RULING**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=e9e1fb7f1c&e=8edd2b8f7d)**OF THE CITIZENS JUDGE CAN BE FOUND AT**[**WWW.FREEDOMWATCHUSA.ORG**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=c92d2576fd&e=8edd2b8f7d)**.** **You may also contact Asher Anderson at**[**asher.andersonfw@gmail.com**](mailto:asher.andersonfw@gmail.com)**for more information.**

In 2008, when Wall Street crashed the economy and millions of American families lost their jobs, their homes, and their savings, I went to Washington to take on the big banks. They had armies of lobbyists and lawyers. But I beat them. After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them. I started out 17 points down, and he had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street. But I beat him too. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, hold Big Banks accountable, and to rein in student loan companies. I know what's broken, and I know how to fix it. I know how to fight, and how to win. We’ve been fighting uphill all the way against powerful special interests. But guess what? We got it all done. **But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just wealthy corporations and billionaires — isn’t over, and special interests are fighting back hard. So I’m running for re-election to keep up this fight and make sure big banks, corporations, and billionaires stop taking advantage of working people. But I rely on this team’s support to continue this work. ** [_**So, will you please make a contribution of $20 or anything you can today to power my re-election campaign and demonstrate our movement’s strength?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68387654/422902603/1012374840?amount=20&refcode=EMZ16B_EGR_E_20230820_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDljMzFlZC1iMDNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGpcarJKAdLh52HNYiSHeKwY3Pv-y3ZRn2GTcRVXavw=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
This is only possible if we work together. That’s the only way we’ve won before — by fighting side by side. And that’s how we’re going to keep making progress.
Democrats win when we go out there and unapologetically fight for the big, structural change we need — to stand up to powerful special interests and advocate for real change for working people. I’m not afraid to fight for this.
Every day, I’m inspired by the Americans who are fighting to demand change and a better future for their families and communities. We've recently seen nurses, teachers, actors, writers, baristas, and retail workers strike for better working conditions, organizers have been getting involved at the state level to pass ballot initiatives that protect abortion access, and millions of young people worldwide have been demanding action on climate change to ensure the survival of our planet.
Now, here’s one thing I’ve learned about how to make real change: It takes a grassroots movement fighting from the outside — and leaders willing to fight on the inside. I’m willing to take on this fight, and your support helps ensure we can campaign for our plans and win.

clean_body: Democrats win when we go out there and unapologetically fight. That’s exactly what I’m willing to do. | | | In 2008, when Wall Street crashed the economy and millions of American families lost their jobs, their homes, and their savings, I went to Washington to take on the big banks. They had armies of lobbyists and lawyers. But I beat them. After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them. I started out 17 points down, and he had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street. But I beat him too. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, hold Big Banks accountable, and to rein in student loan companies. I know what's broken, and I know how to fix it. I know how to fight, and how to win. We’ve been fighting uphill all the way against powerful special interests. But guess what? We got it all done. But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just wealthy corporations and billionaires — isn’t over, and special interests are fighting back hard. So I’m running for re-election to keep up this fight and make sure big banks, corporations, and billionaires stop taking advantage of working people. But I rely on this team’s support to continue this work. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is only possible if we work together. That’s the only way we’ve won before — by fighting side by side. And that’s how we’re going to keep making progress. Democrats win when we go out there and unapologetically fight for the big, structural change we need — to stand up to powerful special interests and advocate for real change for working people. I’m not afraid to fight for this. Every day, I’m inspired by the Americans who are fighting to demand change and a better future for their families and communities. We've recently seen nurses, teachers, actors, writers, baristas, and retail workers strike for better working conditions, organizers have been getting involved at the state level to pass ballot initiatives that protect abortion access, and millions of young people worldwide have been demanding action on climate change to ensure the survival of our planet. Now, here’s one thing I’ve learned about how to make real change: It takes a grassroots movement fighting from the outside — and leaders willing to fight on the inside. I’m willing to take on this fight, and your support helps ensure we can campaign for our plans and win. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I'd rather speak the truth and lose the race than parrot poll-tested platitudes and win. | | ~~Transgenderism~~ ~~Climatism~~ ~~Wokeism~~ TRUTH. If you care about others, you tell them the truth, Fellow American. If you care about yourself, you tell them what they want to hear. I'd rather speak the truth and lose the race than parrot poll-tested platitudes and win. We'll find out next year if that's a winning strategy or not. In that spirit, I've had our team design a Team Vivek "TRUTH." coffee mug. It's time to rebel against the radical Left's cults of transgenderism, climatism, and wokeism. Take your morning coffee or afternoon tea while serving up some HARD. COLD. TRUTH. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. Don't forget - items ship in 7-10 business days! | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. I'm neck and neck with my opponents in the race to become California's next Senator, and leaders like Ro Khanna, Stacey Abrams and Pramila Jayapal endorsed me to ensure that a true progressive wins this race.

I'm ready to take my fight for justice to the Senate where my lived experience as a Black woman making change for Californians will give a voice to those who are currently voiceless. But it's going to take every one of us doing our part, and I'm counting on you to help power this campaign forward, Peter.

**I'll be honest: Looking at my current fundraising numbers** , I won't be able to compete with the millions candidates like Adam Schiff have stockpiled if I don't hit my crucial mid-month goal tonight. So I'm not exaggerating when I say that missing this goal and falling behind could spell _disaster_ for this campaign.

With so much at stake, I have to ask: [**Please, will you donate $10 right now to help me close the 3-point gap in the polls, win in California and continue my work to build a progressive future for all?**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0ZQuAp5biA1z7VIpaPGUyl6Qv-8FJY884g3c5wzhbu8XUer9aC1YApJUTlgxbehnBxDctZxI6SmzyQ4Y6SLwOB2fOAX_pmB3hYkI5CdhaChZllSzNZANpoq7OSDmPxEXIIno69I3s28FdXB8rLzaiJIWSLrOYgPp1DgQ5FyB9gYdkkhK2-NhtRb0P1Scstj-AmVnwSI8QA9U-bU65jIOpDKn_reNfYoJ5LQooRcHv4vY7UOnkXgysE_S3jakYYj3CWVQ3w-vC-QPEFWMUt6YKIHLqas6jYYHiJ_rwf65WLMMkHmmKLQnqbQhGpBtgeciIdH9huRtC2oENYpdHf9R4-Rt6TgV45qWxjVnUFjNpWf3xYYPvqQXRPLAyYtBom0l4BsUcG1BLF8ClqyJpJ43KD7RIX_EdI9Lov1rJSJdAa9o/3yw/OAINJ32BRr-21fLvY1Tz6g/h4/VXyeSIgKZ1DOcMH9f4SSr6nluaCvlIVj2YndqzYEgsI)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | I'm worried, Peter. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, I'm still falling $6,141 short. | I'm neck and neck with my opponents in the race to become California's next Senator, and leaders like Ro Khanna, Stacey Abrams and Pramila Jayapal endorsed me to ensure that a true progressive wins this race. I'm ready to take my fight for justice to the Senate where my lived experience as a Black woman making change for Californians will give a voice to those who are currently voiceless. But it's going to take every one of us doing our part, and I'm counting on you to help power this campaign forward, Peter. I'll be honest: Looking at my current fundraising numbers , I won't be able to compete with the millions candidates like Adam Schiff have stockpiled if I don't hit my crucial mid-month goal tonight. So I'm not exaggerating when I say that missing this goal and falling behind could spell disaster for this campaign. With so much at stake, I have to ask: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you so much for joining this grassroots movement. I really appreciate your support. – Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSBNVKhfRN9uXxucbx81JldCo0n-ce16-q3Zmg6y-Kax05J82WcVKGnuw7yPKhEQctePkVcXz34S6ZThYMxZ-mRWdogsGc-2TOsd3wrUJKKVcWWPFQNm5Xt0I_Rl-62wZlzf9fdFCPaBrslOUgLud8LO6jRRHNpFaOEEo1LSMZAbk)

Friend,

**I want to share an update with you from my work in Washington.**

I recently sponsored the **" No Obamacare for Illegal Aliens Act"** **[(read more here)](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSM68aFm-GI-mDFFKw-IRVAWH1yWVlNacjdHV8dxIXSG1rQZluYK-x3TneXHAiJ63i60nyj49eG5Pf2VJseZz0lWIYsaJD9WogAem58GUrNF7l3lpOHVaOn6rhRDX7d8--tZ2NDmGgE-0NQOi2jowiYUEawF5zXqW0Nc2gJmgfTep)**. After Democrats sponsored a plan to give illegal aliens healthcare that would cost taxpayers **over $100M in 2024 alone,** _I knew something had to be done._ | [**HEALTHCARE FOR CITIZENS**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSJBv66pyqpXkItfDhhRDr1-hHIjhw5p1s7F7uU6j5KjHlBwS6Y0vZ3qvsF39kPEISv1DxH_Vwi-FTiTTNMMd9b4O1JUpu6_PrGnb0Vdlc901qEaDXBwxWlvALrdJSYLF2gO1oOAYqj6-oFo43zCQ8nRDXExaOzARBYEHgh30YpLe)
---
[**STOP BURDENING TAXPAYERS**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSAh_x_XI_MwKOM0KZjJMwgmbRMQVZf8HMon9YP7R69YLDwTIUGa4Z5kNIhrmgYhncZ-308jd5tX7SEAEaJemioWALRrByBfM0wLTUiUWlJXcAAp7Gn4Cj7G-4cLrmU8wmO4SbdMTveFQLnl59-oI56y2K3XLZFoFHN2EHgY2YfQM)
---
[**HEALTHCARE FOR CITIZENS**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSHs1Iau-GxFlV1tcgQo0KAPjE2BLgBczttV0xFRgjo2IH-Or6RxwPR5cXJ4K7-mpU31ZWh9Gf76c0_CRDNW9T7IuX4VI4IeKcc0ghVzJxGXHKMgu5JRflNQfq4GY8B5xA66GqMh3b0cFauFnbRs9WMrw74PRC7Pn5xLC3KJMTBLA)
---
**The American taxpayer should never be forced to cover the cost of healthcare for illegal immigrants. It 's common sense: people who break our laws should not reap the benefits of public programs intended for lawful citizens. **
[**HEALTHCARE FOR CITIZENS**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSBNVKhfRN9uXxucbx81JldDBkWlpdXXt8ws4ust0Iu_RMxTstqatpLmiZ51MC_B1XQllcs-pLHOosSazZlZeuJ0SD1_-JlBM0N7hFIJz_Cz3HNWFG8LjYxKwjmfcpCKh5TIH7EQbI8YIy970lqJSeOH330vYL3v3WMYA7eadE7K0)
---
[**STOP BURDENING TAXPAYERS**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSM68aFm-GI-mDFFKw-IRVAUq2aAriJVSmxOEfbv4hNntNAgx6tQS19Y8axEAUgc21C5ilFz4RhgQAgbTKKSqeDzwj9rUWDP96LkM8CTJaheMFB9-eN7y5NQd1x7QsO23Ic2I8qR_Xjyhq_-8idYmjklqp2FF7s_HYFdqKQZq5euO)
---
[**STOP RECKLESS SPENDING**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSM_gvjTE3PfqlsChXir5itmmfYnD7fhTjGX81mIHogz2fxGXtioeMBGamgwcJ4653o_dtH1iQKEOADiLhfhDSxU-MMu-CSd3252u1YZOWBUYgfldS_Zj-kVjMybiqXVyLC5GQTr6KSMrebC7Gnm18m4KA5qsFfz0_D1fGH6AvG5Z)
---
If you agree with me, and believe that US Citizens should NOT be forced to cover the cost of care for individuals entering our country illegally, **[click here to show your support.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=10e790e46a0246e1b3ea21bcbc19fd79&_e=MdsixnYkcOPxQuzzEVoFvWLfmzf5Tl-QTfTKxwGy7BUE1vJDCTmnICFcU7NqxUNruesdT67LU4Z_4geY1tnIpfYjj2XwTsl1iIhN9JuQBLTaIICeUW9aXa47SWwGJNqTyRTcIfqaydkxXdukcxQnSKjscCkG7zLE0TBm8gJU-ip59lXI9tONYwWdFXokq3jiAUEX4nAbqjzc2GZQpyal7pOQm24u0Z4UQRnWX1zxGs0SXmZQ2dOa-VuyxPEyGmaNVQYLuvCDHdxFsbiTcEHHzzDPyLOKNL-iiKL_tYSKST5JPweppPIZqobEe75iWumk)**

Sometimes I truly wonder where the common sense is in Washington. If only my colleagues across the aisle were a little more like you, friend.

- JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. clean_body: | Friend, I want to share an update with you from my work in Washington. I recently sponsored the " No Obamacare for Illegal Aliens Act" . After Democrats sponsored a plan to give illegal aliens healthcare that would cost taxpayers over $100M in 2024 alone, I knew something had to be done. | The American taxpayer should never be forced to cover the cost of healthcare for illegal immigrants. It 's common sense: people who break our laws should not reap the benefits of public programs intended for lawful citizens. If you agree with me, and believe that US Citizens should NOT be forced to cover the cost of care for individuals entering our country illegally, Sometimes I truly wonder where the common sense is in Washington. If only my colleagues across the aisle were a little more like you, friend. - JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. name: Team Shapiro
subject: a necessity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek – take it from us: **The internet is a necessity in 2023.** But today, **276,000** Pennsylvania households and businesses lack access to broadband. With studies connecting access to high-speed internet with better economic, health care, and educational outcomes, it’s clear that **connecting Pennsylvanians to the Internet needs to be one of our top priorities.** That’s why we’re asking you to [_**sign Josh Shapiro’s petition to expand broadband access. With your support, we can make access to the internet a reality for all Pennsylvanians.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68383444/422892178/1100122924?refcode=email_082023_internet-petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTNiMzI4MC05MjNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CyN6wW8VXCVCFksWuGQiEz9XtYF_23lty7xmDJAuA0=&emci=77dfe871-923f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c13b3280-923f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291) | | [Add Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68383445/422892179/1100122924?refcode=email_082023_internet-petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTNiMzI4MC05MjNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CyN6wW8VXCVCFksWuGQiEz9XtYF_23lty7xmDJAuA0=&emci=77dfe871-923f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c13b3280-923f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)
---
With over $1 billion in federal funds earmarked for broadband improvements in Pennsylvania, **this could be a game changer for our Commonwealth.**
_Now, we’re counting on this grassroots team to use their voices in support of Josh’s broadband plan!_
[_**We think the internet should be treated like the vital utility that it is. With studies connecting access to high-speed internet with better economic, health care, and educational outcomes, it’s clear that connecting Pennsylvanians to the Internet needs to be one of our top priorities. That’s why we’re asking you to | | With over $1 billion in federal funds earmarked for broadband improvements in Pennsylvania, this could be a game changer for our Commonwealth. name: =?utf-8?Q?Greater=20New=20Haven=20Green=20Party?=
subject: Past and Upcoming events
body:
** Paul Garlinghouse
for New Haven Alder
Weekly Zoom Sundays at 8pm.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Paul Garlinghouse, Esq,is a long-time New Haven Green, and an experienced campaigner. His run this year for Alder against an unpopular incumbent in his Ward has enthusiasm. Any Sunday at 8pm, starting tonight, join Paul's weekly Campaign Zoom to learn how you can help the campaign!
CLICK HERE TO REGISTER (https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZIkcuCsrDgtGdZdO0mh1rHERHutQZDJXLz1)
------------------------------------------------------------

** Other Upcoming Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** Date Change!
The GNHGP Summer Social will be Sunday Sept 10th!
------------------------------------------------------------
We are working to organize our summer social event hopefully at Fort Hale park in New Haven (near lighthouse point park). Details to come, but save the date!

https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR315Xl44jS-Q_5sfjJCdgJq_jAADV4KLUMhjKenkbcGg6FpXa4MC8NC2N4

** Our next Chapter meeting will be September 13, Wednesday, 7PM.

CLICK HERE TO REGISTER. (https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZYodequrTsoHNI96Gzl7REnCMwT2GOP_zey)
------------------------------------------------------------

https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR315Xl44jS-Q_5sfjJCdgJq_jAADV4KLUMhjKenkbcGg6FpXa4MC8NC2N4

** SEPT 16, Sat 10AM.
PARADE!
We will march as a group behind our banner in the 2023 Guilford Fair Parade!
------------------------------------------------------------

https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR315Xl44jS-Q_5sfjJCdgJq_jAADV4KLUMhjKenkbcGg6FpXa4MC8NC2N4

** September 17
MARCH TO END FOSSIL FUELS!
NEW YORK CITY
Join the Green Party Contingent!
(email justin@justin4all.org to arrange)
Click for More Info (https://www.endfossilfuels.us)
------------------------------------------------------------

** Past Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Green Party of the United States Annual National Meeting was fantastic - catch everything you missed by clicking HERE (https://www.youtube.com/@GreenPartyVideos/videos)
I particularly recommend the keynote address by Peter Kalmus, climate scientist.
------------------------------------------------------------

** We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!
------------------------------------------------------------

** The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, electoral, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!
Find our chapter Bylaws HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RdZ-DjmwN76_XrktMoS83csmQ4zukzDZ?usp=share_link) .
Read minutes of our past meetings HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing) .
Follow us on Facebook HERE (https://www.facebook.com/GreaterNewHavenGreenParty) .
Follow us on Twitter HERE (https://twitter.com/nhvGreens) .

============================================================
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=ed391ffee5)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=ed391ffee5)
.

name: Survey via Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Andy's first debate: September 20th!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy and Daniel will be debating for the first time on September 20 at Gubernatorial Forum. Peter,

**Andy and his opponent will face off on the debate stage for the _first time_ this election on September 20 at the Gubernatorial Forum.**

The debate will be an opportunity for Andy to showcase the meaningful work he's accomplished for Kentucky and to detail his vision for the future of our Commonwealth. And before he takes the stage, **Andy wants to hear directly from YOU!**

[**Peter: Will you take our short survey right now and share what topics you would like to see discussed at the \- _FiveThirtyEight_

In case you haven’t heard, this Mississippi gubernatorial race is a _real nail-biter_. We know it. The experts know it. And almost every poll shows it (we’re right on Tate Reeves’ heels!).
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68383646/422892682/154683035?refcode=ea.75b27e24-943f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.75b27e24-943f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzViMjdlMjQtOTQzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A7ulOgFwaZi1NRKKQD44x9flmhjfJvziBPTuS88imbc=) **[CHIP IN TO DEFEAT TATE REEVES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68383647/422892683/154683035?refcode=ea.75b27e24-943f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.75b27e24-943f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzViMjdlMjQtOTQzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A7ulOgFwaZi1NRKKQD44x9flmhjfJvziBPTuS88imbc=)**

For starters, Tate Reeves is as self-serving as they get. He’s tied for least popular governor in the nation and 57% of Mississippians say they prefer to vote for someone else. And, let’s not forget that he's caught up in the worst public corruption scandal in our state’s history.

And here's the truth, Peter. This race isn't about party lines. I’m running to make Mississippi work for _everyone_.

As Mayor of Nettleton and as Public Service Commissioner, I worked across the aisle to find common-sense solutions for the issues facing our communities. I've taken on the establishment and shown I can lead for the people.

**Mississippi is ready for a governor who puts people first, not the special interests. And I am here to make it happen.

[So here’s the deal: Election Day is right around the corner, and we’ve got to make every single day count if we want to defeat Tate & the special interests bankrolling his campaign. Can I count on you to rush a donation (of any amount) to help me bring home the win and move Mississippi forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68383648/422892684/154683035?refcode=ea.75b27e24-943f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.75b27e24-943f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzViMjdlMjQtOTQzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A7ulOgFwaZi1NRKKQD44x9flmhjfJvziBPTuS88imbc=)**

clean_body: This race is a real nail-biter. | = Got a moment, Peter? Check out this headline: | Could A Democrat Actually Win Mississippi’s Governorship? \- FiveThirtyEight In case you haven’t heard, this Mississippi gubernatorial race is a real nail-biter. We know it. The experts know it. And almost every poll shows it (we’re right on Tate Reeves’ heels!). = = For starters, Tate Reeves is as self-serving as they get. He’s tied for least popular governor in the nation and 57% of Mississippians say they prefer to vote for someone else. And, let’s not forget that he's caught up in the worst public corruption scandal in our state’s history. And here's the truth, Peter. This race isn't about party lines. I’m running to make Mississippi work for everyone. As Mayor of Nettleton and as Public Service Commissioner, I worked across the aisle to find common-sense solutions for the issues facing our communities. I've taken on the establishment and shown I can lead for the people. Mississippi is ready for a governor who puts people first, not the special interests. And I am here to make it happen. = = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. body:
I’m a lifelong Michigander, a proud husband, father and grandfather, and Democratic Representative for Michigan’s 8th Congressional District.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68384067/422894093/137367875?refcode=email_082023_dk&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmM2Y2YzZC05NTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eBdFCMFsTv4kK-saebnDbMUgLVdkP1k7olkkCx36wWQ=) Hi, it’s Dan Kildee. I’m a lifelong Michigander, a proud husband, father and grandfather, and Democratic Representative for Michigan’s 8th Congressional District.

I was born and raised in Flint, Michigan, and I first ran for Congress because I believe we deserve leaders who will bring people together to get things done.

I’m proud to have helped lead the fight to allow Medicare to negotiate the cost of prescription drugs, cap the cost of insulin, create good-paying jobs, and bring much-needed aid to Flint’s families during the water crisis.

I wake up every morning excited and humbled to work for the people of Michigan, but I need your help.

**National Republicans – who are more focused on creating dysfunction than getting things done – have named me one of their top targets in 2024**. They know to keep their Majority in the House, they need to defeat me.

**Well, they picked the wrong fight. I’ve never let partisan games get in the way of the progress Michigan’s families are counting on, and that’ll never change.**

But if I’m going to fight back against the GOP’s outrageous attacks, defend this critical House seat for Democrats, and keep fighting for Michigan in Congress, I’m going to need your support. **[So I’m asking you personally: will you donate $5 or whatever you can to make sure we win this critical House race in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68384068/422894094/137367875?refcode=email_082023_dk&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmM2Y2YzZC05NTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eBdFCMFsTv4kK-saebnDbMUgLVdkP1k7olkkCx36wWQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68384069/422894095/137367875?refcode=email_082023_dk&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmM2Y2YzZC05NTNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eBdFCMFsTv4kK-saebnDbMUgLVdkP1k7olkkCx36wWQ=)

clean_body: I’m a lifelong Michigander, a proud husband, father and grandfather, and Democratic Representative for Michigan’s 8th Congressional District. = Hi, it’s Dan Kildee. I’m a lifelong Michigander, a proud husband, father and grandfather, and Democratic Representative for Michigan’s 8th Congressional District. I was born and raised in Flint, Michigan, and I first ran for Congress because I believe we deserve leaders who will bring people together to get things done. I’m proud to have helped lead the fight to allow Medicare to negotiate the cost of prescription drugs, cap the cost of insulin, create good-paying jobs, and bring much-needed aid to Flint’s families during the water crisis. I wake up every morning excited and humbled to work for the people of Michigan, but I need your help. National Republicans – who are more focused on creating dysfunction than getting things done – have named me one of their top targets in 2024. They know to keep their Majority in the House, they need to defeat me. Well, they picked the wrong fight. I’ve never let partisan games get in the way of the progress Michigan’s families are counting on, and that’ll never change. But if I’m going to fight back against the GOP’s outrageous attacks, defend this critical House seat for Democrats, and keep fighting for Michigan in Congress, I’m going to need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m so grateful for your support. In 2022 we celebrated an incredible victory as we flipped the PA House, paving the way for Democrats to defend Pennsylvanians from the GOP’s extreme agenda. But our razor-thin majority is on the line again, and we need your help.
**Why pitch in today?**
**→ Protect our hard-won majority:** We’ve come too far to let all our progress slip away.
**→ Empower our candidates:** Democrats are fighting for Pennsylvania workers and families – but our GOP opponent is focused on supporting Trump’s lies and parroting hateful, right-wing conspiracies.
**→ Secure our Future:** Whichever party controls the state House could have implications in our fight to protect President Biden’s electoral path to victory in 2024.
[ Grassroots donors were the driving force behind our success last year, but with this critical special election right around the corner, we can’t slow down. $7 will make a real difference in defending our majorities in key states across the country. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZ4znX1V30AzyoPQGNX0DNOuwba5JJc-bAdbzUgdJ7fVu3xUH2VelY1xyc3hyMRV8sU31Gw0UejHmuL52Wgosoyv6pWgGwxZJXQm9NCtrkKcb5us0imLuxPR0nsjxIll0ukuRAqYQVkwBnS4D17d-Jz2BnFG2PCqVKIo9wpUs7eTRoJokCXqFGAgPEPpZdvuHKCH8IjFlVY2n4tEfU_WqZxpEzTQYgFOCkYEtREQg_03Y11OXTmFEWjc-sJPnMWGCjbpDyxgYnOizseWxz0t0KZ_hSR8Fx2l_IPesoOmjeW2TnceAYDD8pkS_mqKaCQ9lZn_nPbyBAEAVH_MfcFS6cUka6O5_0pkuDgnN5NaD2qFGd0z5KFuMlq27fkKecC7iBTbinJ6VP1L-CpSNAHjLISW1poadOesX-NLlynIcGI_h1q6UAttoJm1duPgaBI2W9blwvZPL-Gke7P6F9Yax_Sg/3yw/im0gqczUQImI2w-fd_qNrQ/h6/keQc4X7Co1ZmiuneHg_5KFNA4FJQbNGHv5wUEbnJBBk)

name: Team Swalwell
subject: If any of these extremists win, our nation will be the one to suffer most.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Officially taking bets on the RNC’s biggest loser ⬇️ |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68384447/422894974/163070490?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzdkNGFjMC05ODNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6htlwnGOERXgYpygDx6QPsvDqYSIkP6oOjrFvySX30=)
Get your popcorn ready, folks! This Wednesday, our nation’s in for one hell of a ride. **The MAGA Circus takes center stage this week as they hold their first presidential debate of the cycle, and they’ve got quite the lineup:** a former vice president who shrugged his shoulders at insurrectionists, the governor of the “anti-woke” (?) capital of the country, a corporate billionaire, _and_ a gaggle of pick-me Republicans. subject: Never forget this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Even when gun violence isn’t in national headlines, it’s happening.
#

Hi there, we'll keep this quick.
We don’t mean to take up too much of your time on a Sunday, [**but we need to reach out and ask if you’ll make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230820-1-30&t=1&akid=6378%2E3935704%2EG96HJr)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230820-1-30&t=2&akid=6378%2E3935704%2EG96HJr)**
Never forget this:
Even when gun violence isn’t in national headlines, it’s happening. Each and every day, communities and families are torn apart by preventable gun violence.
More than 43,000 Americans die from gun violence each year. This is not normal.
Our nation deserves better. We will never back down in our work at GIFFORDS until we see a future where everyone is safe.
But we can only do this work when we have the support of people like you.
[**If you’re with us, will you please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Help fuel our work towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230820-1-30&t=3&akid=6378%2E3935704%2EG96HJr)

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68384635/422895105/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230820_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFiOWU5MDAtOWIzZi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OJ9lFyKiUt7jHziZkm1wRtCTAVxe06h4Lwbm1zPy7CY=) Hey Peter — James Carville here. Let me tell you about the race that’s brewing in Wisconsin. I don’t say this lightly when I tell you Wisconsin will be the tipping point state in next year’s elections. **Defending our Senate majority and the White House depends on reelecting Tammy Baldwin and keeping Wisconsin blue.** And trust me when I tell you: Wisconsin’s elections are decided by razor-thin margins. Less than 1 percentage point decided the last two presidential elections, and Republican Ron Johnson won Wisconsin’s other Senate seat by just 1 point last year. Republicans poured $77 MILLION into Wisconsin to squeak out that narrow victory, and God knows what they have in store to flip Tammy’s seat and deliver the Senate majority for Mitch McConnell. clean_body: | = = Hey Peter — James Carville here. Let me tell you about the race that’s brewing in Wisconsin. I don’t say this lightly when I tell you Wisconsin will be the tipping point state in next year’s elections. Defending our Senate majority and the White House depends on reelecting Tammy Baldwin and keeping Wisconsin blue. And trust me when I tell you: Wisconsin’s elections are decided by razor-thin margins. Less than 1 percentage point decided the last two presidential elections, and Republican Ron Johnson won Wisconsin’s other Senate seat by just 1 point last year. Republicans poured $77 MILLION into Wisconsin to squeak out that narrow victory, and God knows what they have in store to flip Tammy’s seat and deliver the Senate majority for Mitch McConnell. Listen here, Peter: If we don’t pick up the pace now, we’ll be playing catch up to the campaign war chest Republicans are amassing to go after Tammy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I know Tammy and this team have what it takes to defend this seat. Thanks for doing your part. — James Carville HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Team Cori
subject: We are living in a climate emergency:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush has led efforts in Congress to call on President Biden to declare a climate emergency | |
---
Peter, July was the hottest month ever recorded -- and likely the hottest month that humans have experienced on the planet. Wildfires are still raging in Maui, with 1,000 people still missing and over 100 people dead. **The climate crisis is here and it’s killing people.** [**Please sign if you agree: It’s time for President Biden to declare a climate emergency.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QeA4X6s9Yn7PTY5nJ2vcHBSeY_w-ZmkLCWYhgivc3otysVTWquBf_tVe69eJyae7CIGWrhknO9e5Wn-t966RMQwFkHeA5ham2_fEJHrLCoLD16Ofe_JnUS2Kn8WLop_welJOMg5hxIOa375T8YfQviF90wsFJdYsY6I38rwFpgnysoBnQ8I6UHVuPurHGK7lbsHw1IujXRq9bsa_PyIpwx6M3oCOFNzMirxZQv9-8ITZZ9CJ5CBxaq-T7l6IlKb8nH7ZtikCk_7eP1o5thKJPMsKfiUQqvWJ9yIRdJyH7l-yqLA8Z1r33BSWe_jayqMotr250Je6z4C2X14ABVguegQ/3yw/aI4TLFTQQ7yquMMcKwD-_w/h0/6u3NqbsOQHCz95a819TqH9ws_UnqiwbmXJaDpMhRgR0) **[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QeA4X6s9Yn7PTY5nJ2vcHBSeY_w-ZmkLCWYhgivc3otysVTWquBf_tVe69eJyae7CIGWrhknO9e5Wn-t966RMQ6uukWwOCgmMRF7kSzA99i8d5wtvrjLOXzqxlbfyUqa8Jn-sp6zYmrcaFUN3h0ZGhCF9-0oir8aLr2wWufarQZ2d0jXK-vcnhJqGgwl6Uv-rK_9u4lsB0Lke67xCq2Nscf9gPwJcBJXML2LxqNO7uBXDC2KdKE7PWF9kdiHs650JZw6SPIqMivoPrRdP2TKSUoUf1GFVbEv27-PzSkx8YWlbA0PcH8HB8sSa-IBUaVol2ahcmB9wrxjq7XPzRYa5sw/3yw/aI4TLFTQQ7yquMMcKwD-_w/h1/DMeAzbE3OYw99p-9tpHZJw_UfZxsWQdG5lWzKaEmS-Y) ** **Rep. Cori Bush has led the call in Congress for President Biden to live up to his campaign promises to protect our environment and mitigate the worst effects of the climate crisis.** Biden has authority under existing law to immediately stop fossil fuel expansion and declare a climate emergency to speed up a just transition to renewable energy. But his administration continues to approve new fossil fuel infrastructure, pipelines, and leases -- even violating Native sovereignty in the process. Cori Bush has successfully pushed the President to use the _Defense Production Act_ to invest in renewable energy and good green jobs, and has secured hundreds of millions of dollars for federal climate action and public transportation infrastructure. Fossil fuel projects fuel the climate crisis while disproportionately polluting Black, brown, Indigenous, and low-income communities. That leads to disparities such as those in Cori’s district, where Black children are hospitalized for asthma at ten times the rate of white children. So Cori has pushed for investments in frontline marginalized communities across the country with her bill, the _Environmental Justice Mapping and Data Collection Act_ , which was signed into law. But we need to do so much more to prevent the worst impacts of climate change. **We are living in a climate emergency and we must use every resource at our disposal.** [**Please sign if you agree: President Biden must declare a climate emergency now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QeA4X6s9Yn7PTY5nJ2vcHBSeY_w-ZmkLCWYhgivc3otysVTWquBf_tVe69eJyae7CIGWrhknO9e5Wn-t966RMQ2yi9EsN2YzjUgFvczCh9GXSdKLmks41oYUB8jD2zRWvnjjlOOROwfYLRuuNwOnK_GZZuIa8n9_3IMHcGm39xFxLfXC06dNEM8zS_KL5KbSBjbNqW6D0QWwpgyZ8oygdMerqEL7E2jC0BJl6lKvDdY-Mi3kQEMG-39ERtPLWAySGMmHaRnFrwoQNHfyxX9GUIdvFp14wQndHJBmZ616aIbF52lTAkUb5p87KZXlFXktN5l4xhdWzWcAVLWfJYtf26Q/3yw/aI4TLFTQQ7yquMMcKwD-_w/h2/thI00jsBkZBjRrz2Ot_VU0TE9qZKJ8J584haQRoDx8s) In solidarity, Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xrdfKYMyic7pS2MZFPjpSH7J3sKYJSS5k3OQ89RlmYdueOWNuNTHVFoBTOByuxjYej5SzEX-wlE3qMHBA0X-2UDB_490jJeVeEMC-6NcNmdS_JxYpZPlDLtmuxC1f4x22V6r_k88eXi_b_eSJrXeXVNHyP6vbwdcFiLq7XkVk-iU2hlflOpJN6zv3zt4x_u3zqWvTzv4wS9gBe9hEYdrPuAOXXqV856hc3eRkDa1Hr7HgX1BO6WJY0xZkLjACPLdfn_0sWEKcC6Iz_w2GpoZBOc2pbR50HR6OQNgUjIRNmWbXkmzi58NdUXbpp5AxQAkAb7rZsPPbbPW6Dw2Dm08CnqEu0mEqYbsVbirkQc_uqzg/3yw/aI4TLFTQQ7yquMMcKwD-_w/h3/fyktPq0gQx-uP73EqANY8p5EbmOKQY5R5eW_zet1_EE) **

Derek, there is no other way to say this — Senate campaigns these days are expensive, particularly in states like Pennsylvania.
Mitch McConnell is targeting our race in Pennsylvania, so we know we’re going to see millions upon millions of right-wing dark money flooding into our Commonwealth.
We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back — and from traveling across the state to putting TV ads on the air to even buying pens and clipboards, campaign expenses add up fast.
**[_That’s why we are working hard to ensure we build a campaign that is ready to take on whatever the GOP throws at us. clean_body: | | | Derek, there is no other way to say this — Senate campaigns these days are expensive, particularly in states like Pennsylvania. Mitch McConnell is targeting our race in Pennsylvania, so we know we’re going to see millions upon millions of right-wing dark money flooding into our Commonwealth. We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back — and from traveling across the state to putting TV ads on the air to even buying pens and clipboards, campaign expenses add up fast. = | | = Among the Senate battleground states, Pennsylvania is a historically expensive state. With over $381 million dollars spent in the Commonwealth’s 2022 U.S. Senate race, strong grassroots support is critical to our success in 2024. We’re building our campaign early so that we’re prepared for the long road ahead. (Remember — it wasn’t even 24 hours after Senator Casey launched his re-election campaign that Republicans released attacks!) = | | = Thank you so much, Team Casey | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. I hate to say it, but his success is incredible.

The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff.

name: Team Ritchie
subject: re: our dysfunctional Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
I know you’re as angry as I am, Peter

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68384817/422895769/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTI1NmI4Ny05YzNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic6n6c1LcMkOKmpIxA8qEt_fh3MyVOqYsSa2MZ9FWzE=)

I can't help but feel that our nation's most consequential policy decisions are being decided not by elected officials, _but by unelected judges_ \-- and in particular -- **an extreme right-wing supermajority.** | **So Peter, as the Supreme Court overturns decades of progress, I want to hear from you:**

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: we scare the shit out of Republicans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This is the biggest thing we’ve ever been a part of.

| Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.

But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

**That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.

[_**We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68384773/422895663/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230820-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MjU2Yjg3LTljM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sMlHoWY7_FkN9AkpaYIJhKIUpVb9bXxtanMY3gFQolQ=)

I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.

Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

**Let’s prove them wrong.

[_That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Fight for Progress today?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68384777/422895667/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230820-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2MjU2Yjg3LTljM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sMlHoWY7_FkN9AkpaYIJhKIUpVb9bXxtanMY3gFQolQ=)**

David Hogg

clean_body: This is the biggest thing we’ve ever been a part of. | Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. = | = I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong. = | = Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Fight for Progress PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | ---|--- = = Emails are crucial for communicating with top members of the Fight for Progress PAC team. Fentanyl is ravaging our country... Just look at its devastating impact from last year alone: ❌ _**68% of the 100,000+ reported drug overdose deaths last year were from synthetic opioids (mainly fentanyl).**_ ❌ _**50+ million fentanyl-laced fake prescription pills were seized by the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) in 2022 – more than twice the amount seized in 2021.**_ ❌ _**Mexican Drug Cartels are responsible for virtually ALL of the fentanyl in the U.S. today, according to DEA Administrator Anne Milgram.**_ Right here in Louisiana, we’ve seen a MASSIVE increase in fentanyl-related drug overdoses, from fewer than 200 in 2017 to nearly 1,000 last year. As heartbreaking as this situation has become, it’s completely unsurprising given the Biden Administration’s refusal to secure our southern border. --- --- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. --- --- | [LEARN MORE ABOUT clean_body: | | | | We’ve got to secure the border to end this crisis >> We can’t ignore the reality of the situation, Friend. Fentanyl is ravaging our country... Just look at its devastating impact from last year alone: ❌ 68% of the 100,000+ reported drug overdose deaths last year were from synthetic opioids (mainly fentanyl). ❌ 50+ million fentanyl-laced fake prescription pills were seized by the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) in 2022 – more than twice the amount seized in 2021. ❌ Mexican Drug Cartels are responsible for virtually ALL of the fentanyl in the U.S. today, according to DEA Administrator Anne Milgram. Right here in Louisiana, we’ve seen a MASSIVE increase in fentanyl-related drug overdoses, from fewer than 200 in 2017 to nearly 1,000 last year. As heartbreaking as this situation has become, it’s completely unsurprising given the Biden Administration’s refusal to secure our southern border. "Can you donate $5, $10, $20, $50, or even $500 TODAY to help us SOUND THE ALARM before this crisis gets any worse? >>") | | | | | | For Louisiana, | | Bill Cassidy, M.D. United States Senator, Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | From The Desk of Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 = \- =

subject: Your name: not on file
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
do you care about voting rights?
| Hi there, we reached out to you last week about the urgency of passing the Freedom the Vote Act, but sadly, **your signature is missing from our files.**

Democrats control the Senate by just **1 seat.** It’s going to take every grassroots supporter — _that means YOU!_ — to pass this landmark voting rights legislation.

[**Please, can you take just a few seconds to sign our critical petition and show MASSIVE support for the Freedom to Vote Act before it’s too late? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230820_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG) | [58 MORE SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO PASS THE FREEDOM TO VOTE ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230820_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG)
---
Thank you! We’ve attached our original message below for your reference.

_The Voter Protection Project_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
Sender: SIGNATURE NEEDED (via Team VPP)
Subject: incredible news on voting rights
**BREAKING NEWS ALERT:
House and Senate Democrats Reintroduce the Freedom to Vote Act**
[100 LOCAL DEMOCRATS NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO PASS THE FREEDOM TO VOTE ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230820_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=8&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG)
---
We are SO excited!

**_With our democracy under attack, Democrats have taken HISTORIC action and have reintroduced the Freedom to Vote Act!_**

This bill would change everything for our country – it would:

✅ Make Election Day a federal holiday
✅ Enact automatic voter registration nationwide
✅ Require same-day voter registration and early voting

With all these INCREDIBLE protections for our right to vote, you can see why Republicans are hell bent on stopping this bill in its tracks!

That’s why we need to hear from you – our Democrats need to know that the people of our nation support this bill!

[**Please, we need your signature before midnight: Join 99 other Democrats in your area and sign our petition in support of the INCREDIBLE Freedom to Vote Act:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230820_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=9&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG)
[100 LOCAL DEMOCRATS NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO PASS THE FREEDOM TO VOTE ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/PASS_FVA/?source=VPP_20230820_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG)
---
Thank you,

Team VPP
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9973%2E878179%2EC0J1sG)

name: Joe Biden
subject: Three years ago today →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Whatever you are able to afford will go a long way toward helping us build a winning reelection campaign. | | |
---
**Three years ago today, I proudly accepted our party's nomination for president, and together we’ve accomplished so much in the time since.** Peter, I said it then and I mean it to this day: This campaign is about more than winning an election -- it's about winning the heart, and yes, the soul of America. Winning it for the generous among us, not the selfish. Winning it for the workers who keep this country going, not just the privileged few at the top. Winning it for those communities who have known the injustice of the “knee on the neck.” For all the people who have known an America of rising inequity and shrinking opportunity. They deserve to experience America’s promise in full. That’s why Kamala and I have made bold investments in our country -- helping create more than 13 million jobs, taking the strongest action on the climate crisis in our nation’s history, reestablishing America’s leadership on the world stage, and more. **We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in a second term._We’ve got to finish the job._ And Peter, we can only do that with you by our side.** [It’d mean the world to us to have you by our side in this fight. Will you make your first $25 donation to our reelection campaign today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCGwti0VNLZHg96qeIEvJxcZvqglZ4DutSVgmxhDKmtRNM9BYPt1BHQvRB267Do-NTstOFaw4yJWaC9rw_VCqD24ySJBMdGBByoOsRUrT8_fK8WZ5Erz4W-Mw_tl-gygnkbjLcH8VM1huIpEOQZPLf1J4w86UPZYrQtnpkmwjyBcwSsIgiaOi-hnJ051GCVGAMLci8jWvE_-eB8gbI22dV9ojQoScA1ipWN3VobnMHDFzKoYs0zEf4ZlYt22Cr0WYUMq7xCoEC-DgK6jpg190j2A9vXD26497rgFw_SoaRsmNWzobCRKvGf060yzO5-A8F3LWCIysQLnpuQDLYNnpRFVnuoUX-tIMSlVKWCa5EWn62TxJtccst8sfc6BgPd7A/3yw/9gKY8xmlRyaiE_bM8jTJJA/h0/clQDQa8Gh8nagvqbhgTh1fMKkA8OPiij2WK39BzSP2A)

We’re a nation with a strong soul, a strong backbone, and a strong people. We just have to remember this and remember who we are. There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together.
Are we ready? _I believe we are._

clean_body: Whatever you are able to afford will go a long way toward helping us build a winning reelection campaign. | | | Three years ago today, I proudly accepted our party's nomination for president, and together we’ve accomplished so much in the time since. Peter, I said it then and I mean it to this day: This campaign is about more than winning an election -- it's about winning the heart, and yes, the soul of America. Winning it for the generous among us, not the selfish. Winning it for the workers who keep this country going, not just the privileged few at the top. Winning it for those communities who have known the injustice of the “knee on the neck.” For all the people who have known an America of rising inequity and shrinking opportunity. They deserve to experience America’s promise in full. That’s why Kamala and I have made bold investments in our country -- helping create more than 13 million jobs, taking the strongest action on the climate crisis in our nation’s history, reestablishing America’s leadership on the world stage, and more. We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in a second term.We’ve got to finish the job. And Peter, we can only do that with you by our side. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I have always believed you can define America in one word: Possibilities. That in America, everyone -- and I mean everyone \-- should be given the opportunity to go as far as their dreams and God-given ability will take them. We’re a nation with a strong soul, a strong backbone, and a strong people. We just have to remember this and remember who we are. There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together. Are we ready? I believe we are. Thanks, Joe Joe Biden

subject: I know it’s a Sunday…

body:

My team just let me know that we’re falling a bit behind where we need to be to hit our August fundraising goal, and with how difficult summer fundraising has been, we really can’t afford to slow down any more. | | | Hey, friend, I hate to bother you on a Sunday night, so I’ll make this quick. Friend,

I'm reaching out to you with an important message -- I'll be on the ground in Iowa to support my friend Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks.

America is more than just our home. It's a sacred nation and a beacon of freedom around the world. Our constitution must and will be preserved at all costs -- and my friend Mariannette Miller-Meeks is a shining example of what it means to be a representative of the people. She is fighting tooth and nail to defend the cherished traditions of our nation, uphold the Constitution, and, most importantly, represent the people who have entrusted her with their voices.

**[I'm humbly asking you to join me in supporting Mariannette Miller-Meeks in her upcoming election.](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=fc9217bcab7f4b9193d38ab1404d4495&_e=WDbUT01pcurMLR96l15OfVjAdkNt_7EUzz0-J3ReArkYV6OM3EAfcbIPCN6He7fxcb___vYa2JVLxHvhpV9eDUKxh5USkBegfASq-aacb0jIv3HsyBizA-HwYhwCYY2XZiStRqhsFfOC4cQFnjAO_BRNfAuezIVnBuE_xZRLDAm0-gjli-Q21FWiQ8P70nDoU_rQyO5TsxHZGG51bU6xpicq8RN2CPG8_I13Torqp4M1XCFrcitSQBuVVDmYCmI7m9hbNzxqkAGOJ9SbTNTU6jyxBAG49g1O9xUSFHFsdILYUT81PT7TiCMOrCgbrdjM)

America is more than just our home. It's a sacred nation and a beacon of freedom around the world. Our constitution must and will be preserved at all costs -- and my friend Mariannette Miller-Meeks is a shining example of what it means to be a representative of the people. She is fighting tooth and nail to defend the cherished traditions of our nation, uphold the Constitution, and, most importantly, represent the people who have entrusted her with their voices. Supporting candidates who embody the values that make this nation great is essential in ensuring we have a government that works for the people. I 'm proud to stand side-by-side with Mariannette Miller-Meeks in the run-up to her re-election. | Our values have never been under attack like they are today. body:
| | | Fellow American, I’m a retired Deputy Sheriff, veteran, and pastor. What I’m about to say shouldn’t be controversial: **_We must have election integrity in America._**

I might get canceled by the radical left, but I couldn’t care less. If we can’t guarantee that our elections are secure, then we have a serious problem on our hands.**_ _** No one wants to talk about it, but I will:**_I’m fighting for election integrity in America._**
This is Jim Nelson. I served our nation’s military, upheld law and order in my community, and now I live to preach the Word of God as a Pastor. I’m not one to sit silent in the face of injustice.

The radical left doesn’t like anyone questioning their narratives - especially grassroots community leaders wanting to make a difference in DC. This may be news to you, but I’m running in one of the CLOSEST races in the entire country.
---
[**SUPPORT MY FIGHT**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b7632445020d4049ac3baae9389906c3&_e=J3xns1Lel4u-JL2jHEiQ0N8qEZtAo6_Ph3Wh7NCQBabZ7Rz6pXi0pyhcpUyxvXCzXDRWpF2YrkZc5sZbbMx2AMJofUHSQ9dxxdVwiIurKn1x_fBmipe_IEVZA8L1A3JN-RK-I4KLLtHKqnDS0YnsDxrJQRPKA1eSkPFYdp4jXdIFAzE4z1iokW4mt0i20Kt-Jivx_Sp2xQTwqoLQnFe9dYhFxNOlmfz1mTQcjczJHDCdiuc_pw9QawDOrQ4ffh_DdJ3aHabaSe2BYPJ8T5MgYF_6ogrROz0duspqPj9FaDzCysXIRINXPHlXqPDe8cN3oiApfWgitn5FIAZLODDK9--C7nUny7GHeOVMqvFF7g67C_I5n0loVX6JoILSOLxemKYELWengjjw0siffYAS6RQkp87FHEAgNQ76B52r_7um5eiVRT8Az4s4iCh2MNj5-cPobZHUpYTmbVWXSRODOeK6ezqA6t5MqVBVXi7rlB4LhKOSc2_G6WZMjXEOaYWgLD2xebNl8I0QfF6GfXp8_M82AArNRiZeSt9XeLc2VNE%3D)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Pesticide companies really want us to miss this deadline. Don’t let them win, Friend.
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend. Yesterday, we fell seriously short of our National Honey Bee Day goal. Now, we have one last chance to close the fundraising gap and avoid DISASTER for pollinators and our fragile planet. **
Here’s why your matched gift is so critical right now: Chemical corporations are POISONING the precious bees we rely on and risking the future of our food system. Friends of the Earth is fighting back against these companies and their out-of-control pesticide pollution. **But any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits.** We can’t let that happen.
With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to **EXTEND this once-a-year Honey Bee Day match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY.** So we had to reach out to you while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for bees and our planet.
| ⚠️ **DONATION STATUS UPDATE** | **EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS: ****EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m. **
** NATIONAL HONEY BEE DAY GOAL: FALLING SHORT**
**DONORS NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA:** **2**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937918?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m._
---
To be totally honest, friend, we’re worried. **We set our goal of hitting $107,000 before our National Honey Bee Day deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to raise to continue this urgent fight.** We've got a no-nonsense budget, and every dollar has a job to do – whether that's mobilizing communities on the ground, advocating for bee-safe farming practices or putting pressure on Big Ag to clean up its act before it's too late.
**If we fall short, this work gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in polluted farm fields, MORE pollinator deaths and alarming consequences for human health. **
Globally, we're already seeing a drop in bee-pollinated fruits, veggies and nuts. Researchers say this decrease of healthy foods could potentially lead to almost 500,000 excess deaths per year! We can't afford to stand back and let pesticide companies put our bees and our communities in danger. **That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect these tiny pollinators, the ecosystems they maintain, and our planet. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. **
[**Please, rush your $27 membership gift now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at midnight tonight, and every dollar will be doubled – up to $107,000 – to power the fight for our only Earth!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937919?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937920?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1937921?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
