name: The Blue Dogs
subject: What does “fiscal responsibility” really mean?
body:
Spending less than you can afford. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68386318/422899304/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMjAwYjgxLWE2M2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mzidxkSHuPbwnXJ4EPII_pnqr8-sLdIOg_-s_W4L0KE=) | Peter, If you’ve ever balanced a budget or had to make some tough decisions around the kitchen table, you know what “fiscal responsibility” is. **It simply means sticking to a budget.** Hardworking Americans do every day, and yet D.C. politicians act like tough financial choices aren’t part of governing responsibly. As a consequence of emergency spending during the pandemic and decisions made by both parties over the last 25 years, the national debt is over $32 trillion dollars and growing every minute. And we’re the ones who have to pay for it. That’s why Blue Dogs believe in fiscal responsibility. We believe if there is a good policy, we should pay for it - but the wealthy need to pay their fair share. [**If you agree we need more Democrats who value fiscal responsibility, will you please donate to help us elect more Blue Dogs?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68386319/422899305/-1005460103?&refcode=E3783-20230819-FiscalResponsibility-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMjAwYjgxLWE2M2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mzidxkSHuPbwnXJ4EPII_pnqr8-sLdIOg_-s_W4L0KE=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68386320/422899306/-1005460103?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3783-20230819-FiscalResponsibility-EG-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMjAwYjgxLWE2M2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mzidxkSHuPbwnXJ4EPII_pnqr8-sLdIOg_-s_W4L0KE=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68386321/422899307/-1005460103?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3783-20230819-FiscalResponsibility-EG-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMjAwYjgxLWE2M2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mzidxkSHuPbwnXJ4EPII_pnqr8-sLdIOg_-s_W4L0KE=)

clean_body: Spending less than you can afford. | = | Peter, If you’ve ever balanced a budget or had to make some tough decisions around the kitchen table, you know what “fiscal responsibility” is. It simply means sticking to a budget. Hardworking Americans do every day, and yet D.C. politicians act like tough financial choices aren’t part of governing responsibly. As a consequence of emergency spending during the pandemic and decisions made by both parties over the last 25 years, the national debt is over $32 trillion dollars and growing every minute. And we’re the ones who have to pay for it. That’s why Blue Dogs believe in fiscal responsibility. We believe if there is a good policy, we should pay for it - but the wealthy need to pay their fair share. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- We have to get this under control! \- Blue Dogs PAC Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sht done. This is too important, so I am asking for your help, Peter. Tomorrow, our Democratic coalition in the TN state house has to hold off on their end-of-quarter fundraising while they advocate for gun reform in our state legislature. Let’s stand beside them in solidarity and help them hit these fundraising goals, because we all want a safer Tennessee.
We can’t break up the GOP’s state house supermajority without electing more Democrats to the state house in districts across Tennessee. We can’t fight in critical down-ballot races unless we all work together to meet fundraising goals we’ve set — and the one tomorrow is a big one.
**On average, folks are pitching in $30 or less at a time across Tennessee to power this movement. Will you pitch in $10 (or whatever works for you this week!) before the session begins tomorrow?**
[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68386392/422899565/-1788399318?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230820_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTMzMmRiNC1hNzNmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmhrjlehuY5m_iUojHNMLc06NfXTGKKH0TzDaf3hbw0=)

clean_body: | = Peter — I know this is the weekend, so I’ll be brief. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This is too important, so I am asking for your help, Peter. Tomorrow, our Democratic coalition in the TN state house has to hold off on their end-of-quarter fundraising while they advocate for gun reform in our state legislature. Let’s stand beside them in solidarity and help them hit these fundraising goals, because we all want a safer Tennessee. We can’t break up the GOP’s state house supermajority without electing more Democrats to the state house in districts across Tennessee. We can’t fight in critical down-ballot races unless we all work together to meet fundraising goals we’ve set — and the one tomorrow is a big one. On average, folks are pitching in $30 or less at a time across Tennessee to power this movement. Will you pitch in $10 (or whatever works for you this week!) before the session begins tomorrow? = Thank you all, we appreciate you, Peter, enjoy the rest of your evening! Carol V. name: Breaking News
subject: Demand McCarthy to bring gun reform legislation to a vote!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
The U.S. is looking at the deadliest year on record for gun violence, and Republicans refuse to act.

| | | **FROM THE HILL:** **Democrats press McCarthy for vote on gun reform ‘as soon as possible’**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:

---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad263f0820224aa9b00ca76b0a914963&_e=VPqIApNSkJ2GpK_J0nYzHP7fev3ahq_1Xx3qTTv8gbisZ8x-XIUAvCP8GxvtifrIcohof1NROGpymqYWH5CLHuhkFlrX5hXicABnhaDkKhKkGUBBmU1A4bry04Cr3dEgphY57MQhWJHykBZF4RHjYi34_JsWfNZI73CmDvBBwzt3D6zUNyTGy95VWJLjjOYKGlUXlgAQCE1pFR3yo4OJJsSPKPxbgbtPDHps8YEsbxBpwhhh_3_DtXMIRFeys2M0EEFYs6t_jL8btP2-gVWFR_UxIZtR-ritG5A9hO4pNV59TqbEWxcd8kVe7bt3ThphVrFZUt5Db2FyImFpJc4qdEfChZsKff12s_Lv8DA_o1-_8kgV5VZm4v1U84JiR9HPhpQc2vCUSYdsNKIOqaL58h572tKO_hVdN6eRAVAqAE0%3D)

**More than 143,000 people have made an average contribution of $48 to my opponent’s Senate campaign**

Peter,

In just seven months, my opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, raised more than $7 million from both small-dollar donors (**donations under $200**) and major donors (**donations over $200**).

I hate to say it, but his success is incredible.

The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad263f0820224aa9b00ca76b0a914963&_e=VPqIApNSkJ2GpK_J0nYzHP7fev3ahq_1Xx3qTTv8gbisZ8x-XIUAvCP8GxvtifrIcohof1NROGpymqYWH5CLHuhkFlrX5hXicABnhaDkKhKkGUBBmU1A4bry04Cr3dEgphY57MQhWJHykBZF4RHjYi34_JsWfNZI73CmDvBBwzt3D6zUNyTGy95VWJLjjOYKGlUXlgAQCE1pFR3yo4OJJsSPKPxbgbtPDHps8YEsbxBpwhhh_3_DtXMIRFeys2M0O3W8x3jyZEKzTD2zeQoTyJlwCG_yPQTDfcSFFxHEDwVSSU3A_l3DTuBk-7p_Oc78YEB54t-eFWVmHuoGqlos9yilarMYNMqEuVmis55RtSr7EsRBehFYMgTlyY3BSbDdmodTDm8Qsuqt1jzjjlstdwA5s92ddbjCOpuVpgfKuJU%3D)
**143,000 Americans donated to Tester’s campaign from Jan 1 - July 31st, with an average gift of $48. After 16 years in the national spotlight + making friends with ultra-wealthy lobbyists, his fundraising success shouldn’t come as a surprise. But it does.

** [**HELP ME CATCH UP ->
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad263f0820224aa9b00ca76b0a914963&_e=VPqIApNSkJ2GpK_J0nYzHP7fev3ahq_1Xx3qTTv8gbisZ8x-XIUAvCP8GxvtifrIcohof1NROGpymqYWH5CLHuhkFlrX5hXicABnhaDkKhKkGUBBmU1A4bry04Cr3dEgphY57MQhWJHykBZF4RHjYi34_JsWfNZI73CmDvBBwzt3D6zUNyTGy95VWJLjjOYKGlUXlgAQCE1pFR3yo4OJJsSPKPxbgbtPDHps8YEsbxBpwhhh_3_DtXMIRFeys2M05VD8U3KxjjtoJaTGnZCYnKX9umRXcvJ4gbdaRtPcQRe1BsBN0daOr1h6QKQck_Bx0lxDWvM6lhPK37Lx8E3CBEl5oHgTpNemI6KKNYGjC0FTbGjFUBAzsQWbO0di-5PmNJxiD30Zzo5SgPToaASNNZNEpzcvNPpuIF3BXxEq7OU%3D)
It may surprise you to learn that my campaign has only raised a fraction of amount Tester has. I know that we’re not going to be raising as much as he has for some time since I’m still working to build out my profile, however, if our pace doesn’t pick up soon,**I’m concerned we’ll never catch up.**

I’m not going to ask you to pitch in $48 today **(Tester’s average donation this year**) because I know that’s a lot of money. But **[would you consider chipping in $24, half his 2023 average donation?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad263f0820224aa9b00ca76b0a914963&_e=VPqIApNSkJ2GpK_J0nYzHP7fev3ahq_1Xx3qTTv8gbisZ8x-XIUAvCP8GxvtifrIcohof1NROGpymqYWH5CLHuhkFlrX5hXicABnhaDkKhKkGUBBmU1A4bry04Cr3dEgphY57MQhWJHykBZF4RHjYi34_JsWfNZI73CmDvBBwzt3D6zUNyTGy95VWJLjjOYKGlUXlgAQCE1pFR3yo4OJJsSPKPxbgbtPDHps8YEsbxBpwhhh_3_DtXMIRFeys2M0wIkj0MnGWjyQLaWaC3Ltix5ZU_vTNaSHnMJ4t_1GyeqEwh9TyoTVfry1vQT64zPHFXgeAWKKbPdW1dckN-YTXMmKi_MngAsh5GeHW3AgWXN6GDfpJWh6HJePqCgzeaETN0j2_W__BspInlQldJAIF2q4swE51uMLsQjlR7lzDRk%3D) **

[**CHIP IN $24 ->
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ad263f0820224aa9b00ca76b0a914963&_e=VPqIApNSkJ2GpK_J0nYzHP7fev3ahq_1Xx3qTTv8gbisZ8x-XIUAvCP8GxvtifrIcohof1NROGpymqYWH5CLHuhkFlrX5hXicABnhaDkKhKkGUBBmU1A4bry04Cr3dEgphY57MQhWJHykBZF4RHjYi34_JsWfNZI73CmDvBBwzt3D6zUNyTGy95VWJLjjOYKGlUXlgAQCE1pFR3yo4OJJsSPKPxbgbtPDHps8YEsbxBpwhhh_3_DtXMIRFeys2M0QH8E7UVBHAqJlCeLJZ4mqwgIEePFXwtDO9KqD9zkj7YQsCxR3NK0aOTIu7t1LVOwxGCVHL8PHGXJkMeCsJwbG9-HS4KwkNclBiVLNwaiTuFyqBNBIZdmxJ62j6Y04mpnuXxztSgpkAFXuIbhxSFohHyrfEHEYwp3Zdq490WlR-M%3D)

**We need all the help we can get and must start somewhere to keep this race in the Tossup column.**

Despite winning election to the Senate from a red-leaning state, Jon Tester votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time. During Obama’s presidency, his voting record was similarly liberal.

Jon Tester is the epitome of what’s wrong with Washington: **say one thing and do another**. He’s had the opportunity to pass bipartisan legislation under two different Republican presidents and has bucked the opportunity both times.

It’s time for a change. I hope you’ll invest in me. clean_body: Only President Biden and Adam Schiff have raised more this year than my opponent, Jon Tester | | More than 143,000 people have made an average contribution of $48 to my opponent’s Senate campaign Peter, In just seven months, my opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, raised more than $7 million from both small-dollar donors (donations under $200) and major donors (donations over $200). I hate to say it, but his success is incredible. The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff. 143,000 Americans donated to Tester’s campaign from Jan 1 - July 31st, with an average gift of $48. After 16 years in the national spotlight + making friends with ultra-wealthy lobbyists, his fundraising success shouldn’t come as a surprise. But it does. It may surprise you to learn that my campaign has only raised a fraction of amount Tester has. I know that we’re not going to be raising as much as he has for some time since I’m still working to build out my profile, however, if our pace doesn’t pick up soon,I’m concerned we’ll never catch up. I’m not going to ask you to pitch in $48 today (Tester’s average donation this year) because I know that’s a lot of money. But We need all the help we can get and must start somewhere to keep this race in the Tossup column. Despite winning election to the Senate from a red-leaning state, Jon Tester votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time. During Obama’s presidency, his voting record was similarly liberal. Jon Tester is the epitome of what’s wrong with Washington: say one thing and do another. He’s had the opportunity to pass bipartisan legislation under two different Republican presidents and has bucked the opportunity both times. It’s time for a change. I hope you’ll invest in me. I can beat this guy; . Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. This is a rough one, Peter, so please stick with us.
After SCOTUS rolled back _Roe v Wade_ _,_ we were devastated. We saw the right to essential health care stripped away from millions of Americans, and we soon witnessed the GOP’s first attempt at a national abortion ban. But our Emerge community, including supporters like you, rallied together immediately to plan our way forward. **Now, past the one year mark, we’re going to ask you to raise your voice again. **** **

Right now, we’re fighting for our reproductive freedom state by state – **and the battle is in the courts.** We _must_ ensure that the benches are stacked with fierce Democratic women who will defend access to abortion and uphold the bodily autonomy of every person. **But we can’t win this battle overnight.**
**With near-total abortion bans in 18 states, we need urgent action at the national level.** **That’s why we’re asking 10,000 Emerge supporters to answer our poll[now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68387258/422901965/-1211366920?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Femerge-2023-reproductive-rights&code=jtk1287-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmMjQ2ZGZkLWFkM2YtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-Ov4VA1RT2ae17qJuJ2hhERGlEfWiwb_AnSyCHWx5l8=&emci=72e7045f-773c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ef246dfd-ad3f-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=920818), before our midnight deadline.**

Friend, there are just a few days until the very first GOP primary debate. But we already know how the extremists on stage will spend their moment in the spotlight:
**🔴****Attacking President Biden's agenda and lying about his record**

**🔴 ****Promoting conspiracy theories about the 2020 election**

**🔴 ****Pushing their dangerous, anti-choice agenda**
And they're going to be saying all of this on primetime television, to an audience of MILLIONS. **If we allow their lies and attacks to go unchecked, this debate could give the GOP a major momentum advantage over President Biden.** We can't let that happen.

---
